Blinksy works in standard auto-draw mode and does not need to be used in fan mode.

Built-in Fan Mode: Activated by pressing down the mouthpiece
Fan Duration: Runs for up to 10 seconds while pressed, or stops when the mouthpiece is released

Single Retail Unit Includes:
1 x BigFun! Blinksy Device
Charging cable not included

Please Note:
As with many conceal cartridge-based devices, occasional airflow restriction may develop over time due to normal residue buildup depending on the cartridge used. If this happens, a firmer pull may help restore normal airflow and performance.

All cartridges up to 2g that are compatible with auto draw devices are compatible with this device. This means the cartridge must have bottom airflow.

title: Human Grade Gravel Bottom Bangers
description:
Compatible with: Human Grade Dab Rigs, Human Grade Terp Pearls

The Gavel Bottom Banger has a distinct shape that looks like a small mallet or “gavel.” The bottom is thicker and wider than a clear bucket banger and this extra thickness and width help the banger hold heat longer and distribute it more evenly, resulting in more consistent dab temperatures and better heat retention overall.

What's the difference between standard and full weld?

A standard weld banger has a bucket and neck that are joined by a visible weld.

A full weld banger is crafted so that the bucket and neck appear to be one continuous piece of quartz.

Although both styles work well, full weld bangers can be more durable and heat more evenly. They can also be easier to clean as there are no crevices around a weld point.

  • Dimensions: 3.5" x 3.5"
  • Weld Type: Standard Weld OR Full Weld
  • Joint Size: 10mm OR 14mm
  • Joint Angle: 45° or 90°
  • Material: Quartz
  • Opaque Gavel Bottom Design

title: Dr Dabber Switch 2 Sapphire Plus Induction Cup
description:
Switch²™ Sapphire Plus Insert has been developed for those who want an unparalleled dabbing experience. Created out of a lab-grown single crystal of the purest sapphire available. Strict manufacturing tolerances ensure incredibly efficient heat transfer when used with the induction heating system in Switch²™, and the 20mm diameter offers a massive dabbing surface. The Sapphire Plus Insert offers enhanced flavor, greater vapor purity, and easier cleaning than our standard Sapphire Insert (discontinued).

All Switch²™ Sapphire Plus Inserts will have slight striations from the milling process, and each insert is unique. This is due to the high tolerance required to meet our dimension specifications. These striations are purely cosmetic, are not visible during use, and based on extensive internal testing, will not impact functionality or cleaning whatsoever.

  • Heat Retention and Distribution: Sapphire has excellent heat retention, allowing it to hold heat longer and enabling more consistent, efficient vaporization of concentrates. It also distributes heat evenly across the surface, helping prevent "hot spots" and ensuring a smooth dab.
  • Flavor Preservation: Sapphire is chemically inert, meaning it does not react with or alter the flavor profile of concentrates. This allows users to enjoy the full, unadulterated taste of their dabs without any metallic or off-flavors that can sometimes occur with other materials.
  • Smooth Surface: The ultra-smooth surface of sapphire reduces the likelihood of residue buildup, making it easier to clean and maintain. This smoothness also contributes to a more consistent heating surface for dabbing.

** All Switch²™ Sapphire Plus Inserts will vary slightly in appearance **

  • Retail Unit: One (1) Induction Cup
  • Material: Sapphire

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

title: Dr Dabber Ghost 2 Vaporizer
description:
Compatible with: Dr Dabber Ghost 2 e-Chamber

The original Ghost put Dr.Dabber on the map. Ghost2 tears up the map and redraws it — sharper design, smarter heating, cleaner vapor. Ghost2 isn’t a vape pen. It’s a pocket rig. A true daily driver for people who know the difference.

  • Temperature Range: 420°F to 540°F
  • Preset Setting Profiles:
    • Purple - 420°F
    • Blue - 450°F
    • Cyan - 480°F
    • Yellow - 510°F
    • White - 540°F
  • Dynamic Heating Modes: Light will illuminate in a pattern representing heating mode
    • Downward
      • Descent - The temperature will slowly decrease once it reaches the set temperature by the user. This heating mode simulates the thermal decay of a banger, naturally cooling as time passes. This is the default setting.
    • Pulse
      • Steady - The unit will adjust the temperature to hold steady throughout the entire heating cycle. This heating mode is how most eRigs & vape pens function
    • Upward
      • Ascent - The temperature will slowly increase once it reaches the set temperature by the user. This heating mode simulates torching the banger as you inhale, increasing temperature consistently during the hold time.
  • Charging: Type-C
    • Battery Capacity: 20 Heating Cycles Per Charge
    • Full Charging Time: 1 Hour
  • Battery: LiFePO4 non-volatile battery cells built into battery pack
  • Battery Indicator: LED
    • Green - 70% or Higher
    • Yellow - 30% to 70%
    • Red - 30% or lower
  • Radial Sidewall Heating
  • Clean Vapor Pathway
  • Pass Through Charging
  • 15min Auto-shutoff
  • Built-in Protections:
    • Over-Temp
    • Over-Voltage
    • Short-Circuit
    • Reverse Polarity

Includes:
1 x Dr. Dabber Ghost 2 Induction Vaporizer
1 x Dr Dabber Ghost 2 e-Chamber
1 x Glazed Ceramic Mouthpiece
1 x Silicone Top
1 x Type-C Charging Cable

title: PAX Flow Vaporizer with Grip Sleeve Bundle
description:
Compatible with: PAX Flow Accessories, PAX Flow Replacement Parts, PAX Flow Stash Tube

BUNDLES INCLUDES BOTH PAX Flow Kit & PAX Flow Grip Sleeve in ONYX.

PAX FLOW is the latest innovation from the global cannabis brand that defined the portable dry herb vaporization category nearly two decades ago.  Blue Haze now available. 

Intelligent Heating Modes

Choose from four optimized Heat Modes powered by real time temperature control, and dial in the experience that you are looking for. Sip it or rip it FLOW can do it all. 5 Heat Modes ranging from 180°C to 225°C with Bong Mode.

Increased Airflow

A widened airpath delivers up to four times the drawing power of previous models, resulting in traditional smoking experiences without the harshness of combustion.

Easy to Pack & Clean

A refined, side mounted oven door packs like a traditional cannabis pipe. And, an open access airpath and removable mouthpiece allow for quick cleaning that's simpler than ever. 

Hybrid Heating System

A new system that blends conduction and convection resulting in rich, smooth and more flavorful vapor that more efficiently extracts cannabinoids and terpenes.

Fast Charging

USB-C charging supports a rapid half charge in just 20 minutes; a full charge in as little as 40 minutes. 

  • Variable Voltage: Five (5) Modes
    • Temperature Range - 180°C to 225°C
      • Petal 1 (Purple) 180°C - Minimal vapor and discreet sessions.
      • Petal 2 (Green) 190°C - Extended sessions with more vapor.
      • Petal 3 (Yellow) 205°C - Enhanced flavor, smooth vapor.
      • Petal 4 (Orange) 215°C - Maximizes vapor production and denser clouds.
      • Bong Mode (Multi-Color) 225°C  - Hottest mode and can be used with the PAX Waterpipe Adapter 2 (sold separately).
  • Battery: Built-in 2000mAh
  • Size: 107mm x 34.5mm x 29mm
  • Charging: Type-C
  • Heating: Hybrid (Conduction & Convection)
  • Use: Flower
  • Capacity: 0.3g

title: Pax Flow Vaporizer
description:
Compatible with: PAX Flow Accessories, PAX Flow Replacement Parts, PAX Flow Stash Tube

PAX FLOW is the latest innovation from the global cannabis brand that defined the portable dry herb vaporization category nearly two decades ago.

Intelligent Heating Modes

Choose from four optimized Heat Modes powered by real time temperature control, and dial in the experience that you are looking for. Sip it or rip it FLOW can do it all. 5 Heat Modes ranging from 180°F to 225°F with Bong Mode.

Increased Airflow

A widened airpath delivers up to four times the drawing power of previous models, resulting in traditional smoking experiences without the harshness of combustion.

Easy to Pack & Clean

A refined, side mounted oven door packs like a traditional cannabis pipe. And, an open access airpath and removable mouthpiece allow for quick cleaning that's simpler than ever. 

Hybrid Heating System

A new system that blends conduction and convection resulting in rich, smooth and more flavorful vapor that more efficiently extracts cannabinoids and terpenes.

Fast Charging

USB-C charging supports a rapid half charge in just 20 minutes; a full charge in as little as 40 minutes. 

  • Variable Voltage: Five (5) Modes
    • Temperature Range - 180°F to 225°F
  • Battery: Built-in 2000mAh
  • Size: 107mm x 34.5mm x 29mm
  • Charging: Type-C
  • Heating: Hybrid (Conduction & Convection)
  • Use: Flower
  • Capacity: 0.3g
  • Heat Time: 35sec
  • Haptic Feedback

Includes:
1 x PAX Flow Device
1 x Flat Mouthpiece
1 x Raised Mouthpiece
1 x Multi-Tool
1 x Type-C Charging Cable (20W)
3 x Oven Screens
3 x Cleaning Swabs

For cleaning our borosilicate glass pieces, Softglass recommends using a mixture of sea salt and at least 70% isopropyl alcohol.

For cleaning silicone, Softglass recommends to use at least 70% isopropyl alcohol and rinse with water and allow it to dry completely. (Please note: the alcohol could temporarily cause expansion of silicone.)

The Maven Model T is a refillable torch lighter with a unique adjustable angle design, sleek form, remarkable quality and a powerful jet flame.

The Model T carries an adjustable angle that can be rotated clockwise as desired. This key feature makes it a perfect cooking torch for any chef.

  • Retail Unit: One (1) Torch
  • Size: 7.5" x 2.25" x 5.75
  • Light Angle: 45° or 90°
    • Adjustable/Rotatable Head
  • Single Windproof Jet Flame
  • Adjustable Flame
  • Safety Lock/Ignition Hold
  • Butane Refillable

** NOTE: Butane NOT included **

title: Maven Strength Torch (Unfilled)
description:
Packed with power and durability, Maven Strength is finally here! Our newest torch lighter is built with a firm and sturdy grip exterior, and carries a strong angled flame. Strength is the ideal cooking Torch.

Strength also features a sleek rubber/metallic finish, easy push down ignition and a sturdy base, necessary for a tabletop torch.

  • Light Angle: 45° Fixed

title: Maven Firehorn Torch (Unfilled)
description:
The Maven Firehorn is a handheld torch with a solid base foundation and smooth yet intuitive design. This powerful device has a wide refillable butane tank structure and angled top for strategic and precise lighting.

This small and portable torch functions perfectly as a camping torch. Firehorn can also opened and locked as desired for safety purposes as well as adjusted for flame intensity.

title: Randy's Sand Quartz Atomizer
description:
Compatible with: Randy's Inspo Vaporizer, 510 Vaporizers, Randy's Inspo Plus Vaporizer

This atomizer relies on industry leading technology of the sand quartz coil to provide the purest of experiences when vaporizing your wax concentrates.

Sand Quartz atomizers help "preserve" the substance in the atomizer while it's cooling down after a session. A ceramic coil stays hotter longer, which will continue to heat the substance, using it up faster, if only by a miniscule amount. 

  • Pack Size: One (1) x Sand Quartz Atomizer for Wax
  • Thread: 510

title: Astral Project Gemstone Shroom Pipe
description:
Compatible with: Astral Project Pipe Screens

Our purpose is to cultivate a connection to one's highest optimal energy. Gemstones carry many healing and awakening properties that can benefit the mind, body, heart and soul. Be empowered to live life wholeheartedly.

A whimsical twist on the traditional pipe, the Shroom Pipe offers a grounded, earthy elegance that reimagines nature’s most iconic symbol. Sculpted with intention, this piece brings a touch of forest mysticism to your ritual while maintaining the modern refinement that defines Astral Project’s design ethos.

Crafted from high-quality stone or crystal, each pipe mimics the gentle curves of a mushroom cap and stem—making it not only a functional tool, but a collectible piece of organic art. Every pipe is uniquely formed, offering a one-of-a-kind connection to the natural world through its material and shape.

  • Gemstone Size: 1.9" x 1.9" x 2.2"
  • Bowl diameter: 0.5"
  • Package Size: 2.9" x 2.3" x 4"
  • Replaceable Mesh Bowl (Pipe Screens)


Gemstone (Colors):
Astrophyllite - Aids with realignment and inner balance
Blue Sodalite - Stimulates physical prowess and stamina
Blue Turquoise - Aides in truth-seeking, communication and manifestation
Dragon's Blood - Rejuvenates the heart and heals the emotional body
Obsidian - Cleanses negativity out of one's auric field
Opalite (Formerly Opal) - Brings renewed hope, good karma and balance
Red Obsidian - Promotes a sense of stability and grounding
Rose Quartz - Awakens the heart to its purest loving potential

title: MJ Arsenal Capsule Grinder Dugout
description:
Designed for the modern herb enthusiast, the MJ Arsenal Capsule Grinder & Dugout combines convenience, functionality, and style in one sleek, portable package. Whether you’re on the go or relaxing at home, this grinder is your perfect companion for consuming with ease.

Crafted from durable 6061 aluminum, you'll feel the quality as soon as you you get it in your hands. This 4-piece grinder features a unique mill system, allowing you to grind your herbs efficiently while keeping everything neatly stored. The built-in spring-loaded, brass bowl dugout and magnetic top make it easy to access and enjoy your herb, providing a seamless experience from grinding to consumption. Whether you want to store some cones for the journey or keep ground herb for you to rip as you go, Capsule has you covered. Rugged and ready for whatever your next sesh throws your way.
 

Key Features:

Compact & Portable: Grinder size: 1.9" x 4.2", perfect for easy, on-the-go storage.

Efficient Grinding: Unique mill system delivers a consistent, smooth grind every time.

Built-in Dugout Chamber: Keep your dugout, cleaning tool, and ground herb organized in one compact unit.

Magnetic Top & Quick Release Lower Catch: Secure storage with easy access to your herbs.

Durable Construction: Made from high-quality aluminum for long-lasting durability.

  • Retail Unit: One (1) ALL-IN-ONE Grinder, Dugout and Cleaning Tool.
  • Grinder Size: 1.9" x 4.2"
  • Packaging Size: 2.6" x 4.9"
  • One Hitter Size: 2.5"
  • Pieces: Four (4) Pieces
  • Material: Aluminum
  • Teeth: None, Fluted Rotor and Mill
  • Built-in Spring Loaded Dugout
  • Magnetic Top and Quick Release Lower Catch
  • Built-in Dugout Chamber

title: Focus V Connect
description:
Compatible with: Focus V Carta Sport

Our removable airpath solves reclaim management once and for all. Swap in a new CARTA CONNECT in seconds and keep your session rolling - no downtime, no mess. Taste the terps - keeping your rig clean has never been easier.

  • Pack Size: One (1) Carta Connect

To Remove the CONNECT, first, take off the glass top and atomizer. Grab the front of the CONNECT and gently pull it up before lifting from the center to remove it completely.

To Install the CONNECT:

  1. Start by making sure the atomizer and glass top are removed.
  2. Line up the airpath with the base.
  3. Snap the back end into place first.
  4. Then push down the front so it fits snugly.
  5. Once it’s locked in, reinstall the atomizer and glass top.

title: Rescue Detox Instant Cleansing Energy (ICE) 32oz
description:
What you will find are pure extracts of wholesome ingredients like Cranberry and Pomegranate. We even use flower and vegetable extracts to color our products and Stevia Leaf extract to naturally sweeten them. But more importantly, we use the power of Science to unlock and discover the full potential of some of Mother Nature's strongest detoxifiers in order to help you on your journey towards total body purity.

  • Retail Unit: One (1) 32oz Detox Bottle
  • Flavors: Green Tea, Blueberry or Cranberry
  • Works in 90 minutes
  • Cleanses for 5 hours
  • 32oz suggested for people over 200lbs or high to extreme toxin level

HOW TO USE:

Following these simple rules will substantially increase your odds of being ready for your cleansing event.

32oz: Intended for those that weigh more than 200lbs or have extreme toxin levels. Shake well and drink entire contents. Refill bottle halfway with water and drink within 30 minutes.

  1. It is imperative that you are toxin free for as long as possible before your cleansing deadline. 48 hours of toxin free time before a cleansing deadline is recommended but not totally necessary.
  2. Water is a catalyst in the body for purification. Increasing your water consumption in the days before your cleansing deadline is very helpful in the cleansing process. HOWEVER, the day of your cleansing deadline is different as you will need to be careful to not drink too much water. Follow specific instructions on the detox packaging for the appropriate amount of water to consume on the day of your cleansing deadline.
  3. You should not eat any food before and after taking a detox product. Food will absorb the detox and weaken it's powers. It is recommended that you not eat for 3 hours before and after taking detox. If you must eat, avoid foods that are fatty, greasy, or filling.
  4. Once you take Detox it is important to urinate. Your body has toxins in it and after taking the detox your body will need to expel these toxins via urination. It takes most people 3 urinations after taking a detox product to remove the unwanted toxins from their body in order to be cleansed. And it takes most people about 60 to 90 minutes before they can urinate 3 times. Once you have urinated 3 times your body will be cleansed and this cleansing effect will last for about 5 hours.

title: Human Grade Terp Bubble Slurper Bangers
description:
Compatible with: Human Grade Dab Rigs, Human Grade Terp Pearls

The Terp Bubble Slurper Banger is a twist on the classic terp slurper design. It has the same dish-like bottom with slits for pulling in melted concentrates, but also includes a bubble or “bubble chamber.” This bubble shape helps the oil swirl and circulate even more effectively, ensuring the concentrate is spread out for thorough vaporization.

What's the difference between standard and full weld?

A standard weld banger has a bucket and neck that are joined by a visible weld.

A full weld banger is crafted so that the bucket and neck appear to be one continuous piece of quartz.

Although both styles work well, full weld bangers can be more durable and heat more evenly. They can also be easier to clean as there are no crevices around a weld point.

  • Dimensions: 3.5" x 3.5"
  • Weld Type: Standard Weld OR Full Weld
  • Joint Size: 10mm OR 14mm
  • Joint Angle: 45° or 90°
  • Material: Quartz
  • Bucket Dimensions: 55mm Depth x 20mm Outer / 14mm inner
  • Includes: 1 x Marble (21mm), 2 x Terp Pearl (6mm)

title: Human Grade Clear Bucket Bangers
description:
Compatible with: Human Grade Dab Rigs, Human Grade Terp Pearls

The Clear Bucket Banger is a classic quartz banger with a straight, cylindrical bucket. It’s called “clear” simply because it has a uniform quartz wall and bottom with no special cuts, thicknesses or added shaping. This makes it a straightforward, cost-effective option for dabbing.

What's the difference between standard and full weld?

A standard weld banger has a bucket and neck that are joined by a visible weld.

A full weld banger is crafted so that the bucket and neck appear to be one continuous piece of quartz.

Although both styles work well, full weld bangers can be more durable and heat more evenly. They can also be easier to clean as there are no crevices around a weld point.

  • Dimensions: 3.5" x 3.5"
  • Weld Type: Standard Weld OR Full Weld
  • Joint Size: 10mm OR 14mm
  • Joint Angle: 45° or 90°
  • Material: Quartz

title: Human Grade Terp Slurper Bangers
description:
Compatible with: Human Grade Dab Rigs, Human Grade Terp Pearls

The Terp Slurper Banger is a specialized style of quartz banger with a dish-like bottom with slits that allow concentrates to be “slurped” up into the main chamber during inhalation. This swirling action helps spread the concentrate evenly, promotes thorough vaporization and can enhance the overall taste and smoothness of each dab.

What's the difference between standard and full weld?

A standard weld banger has a bucket and neck that are joined by a visible weld.

A full weld banger is crafted so that the bucket and neck appear to be one continuous piece of quartz.

Although both styles work well, full weld bangers can be more durable and heat more evenly. They can also be easier to clean as there are no crevices around a weld point.

  • Dimensions: 3.5" x 3.5"
  • Weld Type: Standard Weld OR Full Weld
  • Joint Size: 10mm OR 14mm
  • Joint Angle: 45° or 90°
  • Material: Quartz
  • Bucket Dimensions: 55mm Depth x 20mm Outer / 14mm inner
  • Includes: 1 x Marble (21mm), 1 x Terp Pearl (12mm),  1 x Terp Pill (6mm)

title: Boveda Packs
description:
Boveda's patented 2-way humidity control continually responds to ambient conditions by adding or removing moisture to affect the enclosed environment and deliver the pre-determined relative humidity (RH) level printed on the pack.

It’s impossible for Boveda to over-humidify beyond the RH on the pack. That’s why our usage instructions talk about minimums, not maximums. There’s no such thing as using “too much”. More than the minimum will just last longer.
 

 

58% 1g:
 

  • Uses: Terpene retention and protection from moisture loss
  • Supports: Up to 1/8 oz. (3.5g)

description:
**NOTE: Battery is a new flat top edition to accommodate 2g cartridges and comes with a domed threaded adapter for a smoother transition between battery and 1g cartridges and does NOT have eGo threading. Product received will include updated packaging. **

Looking for eGo threaded batteries? Check out our Cartisan eGo Spinner Twist 900 and Cartisan eGo Spinner Twist 1300 Batteries.

The first Cartisan battery that can conveniently be charged via USB-C or a lightning cable. 

A simple variable voltage vaporizer with 510 threading that comes in beautiful retail ready packaging. The voltage settings are easy to change by simply clicking the button 3 times. This twist battery includes a skirt adapter so it can be used with any 510 cartridge and still look great.

Battery Capacity: Built-in 900 mAh
Threading: 510
Charging: USB-C (included) or Lightning Cable
Includes Skirt Adapter: Yes
Power Method: 5 button click on/off 
Pre-Heat Funtion: 2 button click
Variable Voltage: 3 button click Variable Voltage

GREEN = 3.4V
BLUE = 3.7V
RED = 4.0V 

Includes:
1 x Cartisan Button VV 900 Dual Charge Device
1 x Type-C Charging Cable
1 x Skirt Adapter

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

How do I turn my battery on?

  • To turn this battery on/off click the button repeatedly 5 times

How do I charge my battery?

  • To charge this battery please use a USB-C or Lightning charger cable and plug it into a power source.

How do I change the voltage of my pen battery?

  • Click the button 3 time repeatedly to change the voltage, these batteries have three different voltage settings GREEN=3.4V BLUE=3.7V RED=4.0V

Why does my battery blink with the cartridge attached?

  • Chances are your cartridge is not making a proper connection to device. Try using a different cartridge, if your battery does not work with ANY cartridge please contact your retailer for a replacement battery. If the battery works without a cartridge, it is not a defective and will not be replaced.

How do I know if my battery is charging/charged?

  • While the battery is charging the light on the charge will be red and the light on the battery will be on. Once charging is complete, the light on the charger will turn green and the light on the battery will turn off.

title: Glob Mops XL 2.0
description:
Product Information: 

Each retail sellable unit contains 300 Glob Mops.

Made of Bamboo and 100% pure cotton.

These Glob Mops have three times more cotton than the original V1 mops and have extra loose cotton for better absorption.

These are not simple ordinary cotton swabs. The creator of Glob Mops started out using regular cotton swabs and decided something better was needed. He tweaked the design of the regular cotton swab to have wooden sticks for more durability and made one end pointed for those hard-to-get corners.

Use these Glob Mops to keep quartz nails and bangers clean after each use. Nails and bangers can show oil residue and oxidation after just one use. Glob Mops prevent oxidation and torching and are specifically designed for ease of use.

title: Lookah Dab Straw
description:
Product Information

 

The Lookah dab straw is a traditional style dab device coming in a stylish carry case that's no bigger than a spectacles case. Unlike the other Lookah dab pens, this honeys straw doesn't use electronics. You will need a torch to heat up the tip or titanium dab nail, which functions like a standard nectar collector. 

The shape and size of the Lookah dab straw is similar to a ballpoint pen. The dab straw comprises five parts that disassemble for easy cleaning. The glass mouthpiece can be pulled out of place to clean and capture reclaim. Should you accidentally break this, there is a spare mouthpiece, so you're never without one. The dab kit comes with two titanium nails that can be unscrewed and swapped.

title: Efest Pro C4 Battery Charger
description:
Product Information

** Battery Chargers DO NOT include EFEST batteries **

The Efest PRO C4 Charger is a simple and cost-efficient charger designed by Efest. The Efest PRO C4 Charger is a four bay charger powered by a AC wall plug and can charge four batteries at the same time. When charging one or two batteries at the same time, the charging current will adjust intelligently to 1A. When charging three or four batteries at the same time, the charging current will adjust intelligently to 0.5A. The LED indicator light is red when your battery is charging and turns green when the battery is fully charged. The Efest PRO C4 Charger can charge different types of 3.6V/3.7V lithium batteries commonly used in electronic cigarettes, flashlights, electric tools, and more.

Please note, due to size limitations, you may only charge up to (2) 26500 or 26650 batteries at the same time.

Features and Specs:

title: Efest Slim K1 Battery Charger
description:
Product Information

The Efest Slim K1 Charger is a high quality with a cost-efficient and portable design. The Efest Slim K1 Charger is a single slot charger with Micro USB input and charges at 1A. The LED indicates when your battery is charging and when the battery is fully charged.

The Efest Slim K1 Charger features reverse polarity, short circuit, overcharge protection and many more safety features. The Efest Slim K1 Charger can charge different types of 3.6V/3.7V lithium batteries commonly used in electronic cigarettes, flashlights, electric tools, and more.

title: Cotton Buds (10 Pack)
description:
Product Information 

How to use Cotton Buds with ISO Basin


Retail Units: 10 sellable tubs

The Container

Made of translucent plastic, this tub has a hinged top so there's no way it can be lost. Each tub holds 200 cotton buds.

The Buds

Cotton Buds from The Depot are made using a durable bamboo stem and 100% organic cotton on both ends.

The rigid bamboo stems ensure that glass can get a good scrubbing and are strong enough to not snap and break.

The pointy side of the buds help to get into every nook and cranny of the banger, while the rounded side has extra absorbent cotton to make sure every last glob can be mopped up!

Bamboo + Cotton are both biodegradable and renewable.

This product works best when used with the ISO Basin from The Depot.

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

title: ISO Basin (5 Pack)
description:
Product Information 

How to use Cotton Buds with ISO Basin


Retail Units: 5 Basins

The ISO Basin from The Depot is a must-have part of any proper dab station. The basin can store up to 7 ounces of ISO and the pump was purpose-built to make it easy to use without bending cotton buds.

Never lose ISO to evaporation or spillage again.

Pump ISO by simply pressing down with any cotton bud or dab tool and simply close the top when you're done for the quickest way to keep all of your gear clean.

Note: No isopropyl alcohol is included with the ISO Basins

This product works best when used with Cotton Buds from The Depot.

title: Cartisan Button VV 900 Dual Charge (MICRO-USB) 2G Variants
description:
Product Information

The first Cartisan battery that can conveniently be charged via Micro-USB or a lightning cable. 

A simple variable voltage vaporizer with 510 threading that comes in beautiful retail ready packaging. The voltage settings are easy to change by simply clicking the button 3 times. This twist battery includes a skirt adapter so it can be used with any 510 cartridge and still look great.


Includes a convenient skirt adapter!

Battery Capacity: 900 mAh
Charging: Micro-USB or Lightning Cable (included)
Includes Skirt Adapter: Yes
Power Method: 5 button click on/off 
Variable Voltage: 3 button click Variable Voltage

GREEN = 3.4V
BLUE = 3.7V
RED = 4.0V 

Includes:
1 x Cartisan Button VV 900 Dual Charge Device
1 x Lightning Cable
1 x Skirt Adapter

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

How do I turn my battery on?

  • To turn this battery on/off click the button repeatedly 5 times

How do I charge my battery?

  • To charge this battery please use a Micro-USB or Lightning charger cable and plug it into a power source.

How do I change the voltage of my pen battery?

  • Click the button 3 time repeatedly to change the voltage, these batteries have three different voltage settings GREEN=3.4V BLUE=3.7V RED=4.0V

Why does my battery blink with the cartridge attached?

  • Chances are your cartridge is not making a proper connection to device. Try using a different cartridge, if your battery does not work with ANY cartridge please contact your retailer for a replacement battery. If the battery works without a cartridge, it is not a defective and will not be replaced.

How do I know if my battery is charging/charged?

  • While the battery is charging the light on the charge will be red and the light on the battery will be on. Once charging is complete, the light on the charger will turn green and the light on the battery will turn off.

title: Hohm Mega 18650 (2) Batteries
description:
Product Information

  • Pack Size: Two (2) Batteries
  • Capacity: 2505mAh
  • Max Charge Current:  29.5V
  • Continuous Discharge Rate: 22A
  • Energy Density (wt.): 193.3 Wh/kg
  • Energy Density (vol.): 544.7 Wh/l
  • Cycle Life Retention: 500 Cycles (77%)
  • Chemistry Type: DSP Li-NMC
  • PDF Snapshot: Brochure


Hohm MEGA takes all the proprietary external features users have come to expect from Hohm Tech, and builds on top (inside) of that. This cell is designed for users that are seeking an affordable cell that does not sacrifice performance or reliability. We proudly introduce the Hohm MEGA. Equipped with: 1] Anti-counterfeit top cap; 2] ANSI+ATD compliant labeling/packaging; 3] DSP chemistry that increases cycle life beyond QSP formula.

These are rated by Indonesia Chemistry at 2505mAh capacity, with a CDR of 22A, and 80oC | 3.2V cut-off limit (whichever occurs first) @ 29.5A. For EV and DC motor applications, the MEGA cell handles repeated 37.6A loads @ 5s on, 30s off (Surge/Pulse). All ratings are subject to meet and/or exceed strict limitation policies set forth for DLr1, TID2, PVDL3, CLR4, mΩR5, and Temperature (°C). Hohm MEGA is built from the DSP NMC chemistry formulation, with manganese inert compound replaced with additional proprietary levels of cobalt & nickel as well as added custom bonding agents to achieve unprecedented capabilities. It is further enhanced with components from industry-leading manufacturers that give it the heartbeat of Hohm Tech.

Labeling and packaging are both equipped with information that exceeds ANSI + ATD standards, regulations, and compliance. 100% Hohm Tech, 0% nonsense.

Every Hohm Tech cell model has been tested and certified by UN38.3, EN62133, IEC62133 2nd Edition, and UL1642 accredited laboratories and testing facilities assigned by regulatory bodies. This includes MSDS, CE, ROHS, UN38.3, IEC, PSE, Specifications, and Air/Sea Transport certifications. We do not cut corners. We deliver what we promise… chart-topping performance, capacity, consistency, and safety.

To expound on safety: 

  • modified cathode tag consisting of higher purity aluminum is utilized to aid in lowering internal resistance
  • updated poly seal with refined bitumen is installed in every cell to ensure excess pressure is controlled

* NOTICE: Hohm Tech does not manufacture batteries. These are licensed and made specific to the requirements set forth.
** CAN BE CHARGED AT 4.14A. This is not a misprint. 4.14A as in FOUR POINT ONE FOUR-amp charging is possible, tested, proven, and approved within all strict safety protocols set by Indonesia Chemistry.
*** TESTING BEYOND TEMPERATURE. Hohm Tech cells utilize both static & dynamic testing that includes but not limited to: density loss, thermal distribution, volt drop limiters, cycle life retention, and temperature. These tests are imperative to achieve true cell performance, longevity, and overall quality.

  1. Thermal Image Distribution
  2. Pulse Voltage Drop Limitation
  3. Cycle Life Retention
  4. Resistance Retentivity Pre|Post
  5. Pulse & Peak is applicable to Dynamic EV Systems ONLY and rated @ ≤5 SEC ON / ≥30 SEC OFF
 
WARNING:  LI-ION CELLS HAVE INHERENT RISKS IF MISUSED OR MISHANDLED.  CELL CAN EXPLODE CAUSING SEVERE BURN INJURY, FATALITY, AND PROPERTY DAMAGE.  – READ BELOW THOROUGHLY –



READ BROCHURE HERE
CELL= BATTERY



  • KEEP OUT OF REACH of anyone under 18 years of age, AND pets.
  • DO NOT PUT IN FIRE, oven, microwave, or expose to anything over 100oC (212oF)
  • DO NOT CARRY or store OUTSIDE of its protective packaging or a PROTECTIVE CELL CASE.
  • DO NOT PUT IN POCKET, bag, purse, or anywhere WITH METAL OBJECTS including COINS and KEYS. Otherwise, cell(s) could short-circuit and explode.
  • DO NOT PUT A DEVICE WITH CELL(S) INSTALLED IN POCKET or ON YOUR BODY. As unlikely as it may be, a device can malfunction, have a defect, internal damage, and/or be affected by conductive debris or object(s) in pocket that can overload or short-circuit cell causing it to explode.
  • DO NOT USE IN A DEVICE THAT CAN EXCEED MAX CELL WATTAGE (W) or AMPERAGE (A) (listed on each cell and retail packaging). Otherwise, this can overload a cell, causing it to explode.
  • DO NOT USE A LOWER RESISTANCE (Ω) # (listed on each cell and retail packaging). Otherwise, this can overload cell, causing it to explode.
  • DO NOT USE CELL WITH ANY DAMAGE TO ITS STRUCTURE OR OUTER PROTECTIVE LABEL (also called “WRAP”, “sleeve”, “skin”). Damage may include: dent(s), tear(s), nick(s), puncture(s), corrosion, or any other undisclosed abnormalities or damages. Otherwise, a cell can short-circuit and explode. ALWAYS INSPECT cell VISUALLY and by TOUCH to SEE/FEEL for damage BEFORE EACH USE. ** SEE ILLUSTRATION BELOW AS GUIDELINE. **
  • DO NOT LEAVE UNATTENDED WHILE CHARGING, & REMOVE CELL(s) FROM CHARGER ONCE FULLY CHARGED to ensure it is not exposed to any potential charger malfunction such as overcharging which could damage cell causing it to explode.
  • DO NOT CHARGE HIGHER THAN MAX CHARGE VOLTAGE (V) (typically 4.2V) or DISCHARGE BELOW MAX VOLTAGE CUT-OFF (V) (typically 2.5V). Overcharging or over-discharging cell(s) can cause irreversible damage and cause it to explode.
  • DO NOT MIX WITH USED or DIFFERENT BATTERY TYPES. Differences in cell capacity can lead to one or more cell(s) being overcharged or over-discharged.
  • IF USING A MULTI-CELL DEVICE, the device MUST HAVE A NON-CONDUCTIVE BARRIER (typically plastic) OR FITMENT that PREVENTS CELL(S) from TOUCHING THE SIDE(S) OF ONE ANOTHER OR ANY ADJACENT METAL except for the very center of top and bottom of the cell. Otherwise, cell(s) could short-circuit and explode.
  • ALWAYS use, connect, charge, and operate cell(s) within their capabilities as listed on each cell, packaging, and product detail pages, while adhering to the device’s user manual.
  • COMPLETELY READ and follow the WARNING section listed on each cell, packaging, and here, in its entirety.
  • SEARCH www.YouTube.com for “18650 EXPLOSIONS” to understand the importance of consistently taking safety precautions and using Li-ion cells properly. Hohm Tech advocates recycling and replacing any damaged Li-ion cell/battery. As a tool to find your LOCAL RECYCLE CENTER. Or visit Hohm Tech Warranty Center for recycling and replacement. Your safety is #1.

Compatible with: Softglass Tandem Rig Bases, Softglass Tandem Rig Tops, Softglass Tandem Rig Sleeves, Softglass Carb Caps, Softglass Standard Quartz Bangers

The Tandem Rig is crafted with sophistication, durability, and modularity in mind.

The tactile platinum cured silicone sleeves are sculpted to be beautiful, protective, and dishwasher safe. Cleaning is also a breeze, thanks to the use of modular borosilicate glass which allows for total customization. Experience the pinnacle of concentrate with the Tandem Rig.

  • Size: 7.48" x 4.17"
  • Material: Borosilicate Glass, Silicone
  • Joint Sizes: 10mm OR 14mm
  • Percs: Ball Perc OR Incycler
  • Silicone Colors: Onyx, Pistachio OR Sienna
  • Customizable Components

Includes:
1 x Softglass Borosilicate Glass Top
1 x Softglass Silicone Top Sleeve
1 x Softglass Borosilicate Glass Base (10 or 14mm)
1 x Softglass Silicone Protective Base
1 x Softglass Quartz Bucket (10 or 14mm)
1 x Softglass Borosilicate Bubble Cap
1 x Softglass Silicone Cap Sleeve

title: MJ Arsenal Carb Caps
description:
Product Information

 

  • Style: Flat / Bubble / Spinner
  • Material: Quartz

Flat Carb Cap:

Custom designed by popular demand, MJA is proud to introduce our directional carb cap! Made specifically for the MJA line of products, this direction flow cap was designed by consumers, for consumers. 

Will work with most quartz nails and essential oil attachments.

Elevate the ordinary with MJA.

  • Dimensions: 1" x 1.2"
  • Size: 30mm width

Spinner:

After several weeks of R&D we are proud to finally offer the MJA Spinner Carb Cap! With 4 directional carb holes to promote circular airflow, watch your terp pearls/oil spin with even the lightest of pulls. Increase control over your oil, keep your air flow consistent, and your pearls a'spinning. 

This spinner carb cap is a game changer.

  • Dimensions: 1.5" x 0.7"

    Spinner - Iridescent:

    In our latest Limited Edition series, we are as excited as ever to release our freshest MJA Colors Collection drop yet! Feast your eyes on the mesmerizing iridescent electroplated borosilicate finish. From every angle, you will see a different color or shimmer!  

    Enjoy our spinner cap like never before in this brand new, collectible, colorful, and limited offering by MJ Arsenal!

    This is a Limited Edition drop only available while supplies last. 

    Sacrifice nothing and elevate the ordinary with MJ Arsenal!

    • Dimensions: 1.5" x 0.7"

    Spinner - Mushroom:

    Expand your dabbing consciousness with these fungus inspired psychonaut carb cap accessories! 

    Add a little function and enjoy the adventure!

    • Dimensions: 1.5" x 1.2"

    Bubble Cap:

    You asked and we listened! The MJA Direction Bubble Caps are here! Throw your oil against the walls of any quartz attachment for the most flavorful, even heated puff possible! 

    Fits well with all flat-top MJA quartz attachments as well as many other generics.

    • Dimensions: 1.7" x 0.5"

    Bubble Cap - Iridescent:

    In our latest Limited Edition series, we are as excited as ever to release our freshest MJA Colors Collection drop yet! Feast your eyes on the mesmerizing iridescent electroplated borosilicate finish. From every angle, you will see a different color or shimmer!  

    Enjoy our classic bubble cap like never before in this brand new, collectible, colorful, and limited offering by MJ Arsenal!

    This is a Limited Edition drop only available while supplies last. 

    Be sure to secure your Iridescent Bubble Cap by joining our Team MJA mailing list or by selecting "Email when available", first come first served! 

    Sacrifice nothing and elevate the ordinary with MJ Arsenal!

    • Dimensions: 1.7" x 0.5" 

    Bubble Cap - Mushroom:

    The latest Limited Edition Carb Cap from MJA!

    Expand your dabbing consciousness with these fungus inspired psychonaut carb cap accessories! 

    Add a little function and enjoy the adventure!

    • Dimensions: 2" x 0.5"

    This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

title: Wild Berry Backflow Cones Refills
description:
Product Information

*** JAR NOT INCLUDED ***

  • Retail Unit: One (1) bag. Each bag contains 25 Cones.
  • Cone Size: 1"
  • Specifically used with BACKFLOW BURNERS.

Fragrances:
Champa Flower - An exotic floral with notes of rose, sweet herbs and fresh berries.
Cherry Vanilla - A fresh cherry fragrance blended with rich vanilla.
Dragon's Blood - An exotic earthy fragrance with subtle notes of pine needle, Arabian sandalwood, musk and amber.
Fairy Dust - A fresh citrus scent with notes of bergamot, lavender, musk and patchouli.
Fizzy Pop - An effervescent splash of lemon lime soda fragrance.
King Cake - A delectable cinnamon sugar scent with notes of fresh churned butter, agave nectar, powdered sugar and vanilla bean.
Ocean Wind - An invigorating citrus scent bursting with notes of fresh lime, tart grapefruit, warm jasmine, amber and musk.
Peace Of Mind - A serene floral blend with notes of juicy peach, black currant, lilac, spicy hyacinth and warm vanilla bean.
Sandalwood - A lovely sandalwood scent with notes of shaved cedarwood, delicate rose petal and rich amber.
Sea Breeze - A crisp clean scent with fresh notes of sparkling lemon, watery jasmine, sun-drenched oak moss and powdery musk.
Sweet Pea - A bright fruity floral fragrance with notes of Anjou pear, gala apple, pink sweet pea, Mediterranean cyclamen and summer raspberry.
Wizard - An enchanting citrus scent with notes of Sicilian bergamot, sheer yuzu, coriander spice, silver birch, atlas cedar and white musk.

title: Wild Berry Incense Sticks
description:
Product Information

 

Compatible with: Wild Berry Jars (ONLY for Dream Caster, Happy Hour, Mystic Meadow, Sparkle Berry, Tootie Frootie and Wake-N-Waffle scents)

These incense are sold in bags of 100. They do not come in a box or a jar. For the Wild Berry Starter Kit which includes all of these incense with jars and a display rack: see here.

They can be placed into any jar or sold individually in the bags available below.


Made in Oxford, Ohio 

Zip Top Bags:

  • Pack Size: 100 Zip top bags
  • For: 11" incense sticks
  • Size: 2" x 12"

Incense Sticks:

  • Pack Size: 100 Hand-dipped Sticks
  • Size: 11" 
  • Jars NOT included

Fragrances:
Blend 22™
A fruity mix of over a dozen fragrances. Notes include strawberry, heliotrope blossom, ginger, peach, patchouli and cinnamon spice.

  • Base Color: Natural
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Spicy

Cherry Vanilla
A fresh cherry fragrance blended with rich vanilla. Deeper notes include bourbon and maple sugar.

  • Base Color: Red
  • Accent Color: Pink
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Foodlike

Champa Flower™
An exotic floral with notes of rose, sweet herbs and fresh berries. Deeper notes include patchouli, sandalwood and vanilla. Our version of the popular classic Nag Champa.

  • Base Color: Yellow
  • Accent Color: Red
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Florals and Greens

Dragon's Blood
An exotic earthy fragrance with subtle notes of pine needle, Arabian sandalwood, musk and amber. Inspired by the aromatic bright red sap produced by the Dracaena Draco tree.

  • Base Color: Deep Purple
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Earthy, Spicy

Dream Caster™
Masculine and modern, this scent combines aromatic herbs of suede and teakwood.

  • Base Color: Light Blue
  • Paint Length: Long

Egyptian Cotton™
A crisp and refreshing fragrance with clean linen notes.

  • Base Color: White
  • Accent Color: Light Blue
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fresh and Clean

Fizzy Pop™
An effervescent splash of lemon lime soda fragrance. Bright sparkling notes include energizing citrus, light orange flower and citronella.

  • Base Color: Blue
  • Glitter: Glitter
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Fresh and Clean, Foodlike

Fresh Rain
A clean crisp fragrance with notes of bergamot orange, fresh lemon, rose, lavender, sweet herbs and warm musk.

  • Base Color: Light Blue
  • Paint Length: Medium
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Fresh and Clean

Happy Hour™
A refreshing cocktail that combines bright citron and lime fizz with a gin accord.

  • Base Color: Green
  • Paint Length: Short

King Cake™
A delectable cinnamon sugar scent with notes of fresh churned butter, agave nectar, powdered sugar and vanilla bean.

  • Base Color: White
  • Accent Color: Yellow
  • Glitter: Glitter
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Spicy, Foodlike

Mystic Meadow™
A succulent sweet grass scent with notes of fresh cut stems and exotic tiger lily.

  • Base Color: Dark Green
  • Paint Length: Short

Ocean Wind
An invigorating citrus scent bursting with notes of fresh lime, tart grapefruit, warm jasmine, amber and musk.

  • Base Color: Blue-green
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Fresh and Clean

Opium
A rich, spicy scent with delicate notes of petitgrain, soft lemon, ylang ylang, carnation petal, cinnamon, patchouli and warm vanilla. Our version of the popular perfume by YSL.

  • Base Color: Black
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Earthy, Spicy

Patchouli
A classic patchouli fragrance infused with notes of jasmine, soft musk, clean cedar wood and frangipanni petals.

  • Base Color: Brown
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Earthy, Woods, Spicy

Peace of Mind™
A serene floral blend with notes of juicy peach, black currant, lilac, spicy hyacinth and warm vanilla bean.

  • Base Color: Pink
  • Paint Length: Medium
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Florals and Greens

Raspberry Rose
A mouth-watering raspberry rose scent with notes of tart orange, succulent pineapple, sweet strawberry, ylang-ylang, cherry, vanilla and caramelized sugar.

  • Base Color: White
  • Accent Color: Red
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Florals and Greens

Sandalwood
A lovely sandalwood scent with notes of shaved cedar wood, delicate rose petal and rich amber.

  • Base Color: Dark Green
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Woods

Sparkle Berry™
Berry and bright, this fragrance blends sugared berries with sparkling orange and creamy vanilla.

  • Base Color: Brown
  • Paint Length: Short

Sweet Pea
A bright fruity floral fragrance with notes of Anjou pear, gala apple, pink sweet pea, Mediterranean cyclamen and summer raspberry. Our version of the popular scent by Bath & Body Works.

  • Base Color: Light Green
  • Paint Length: Short
  • Fragrance Family: Fruits, Florals and Greens

Tranquility
A relaxing citrus blend with notes of bright lemon, fresh lime, sandalwood and soft amber.

  • Base Color: Blue
  • Accent Color: Light Blue
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Fresh and Clean

Tootie Frootie™
A bright splash of fruit punch fragrance with notes of juicy orange, tart cherry and sweet berry.

  • Base Color: Teal
  • Paint Length: Long

Vanilla
A warm vanilla fragrance with rich notes of vanilla bean, aged bourbon, and maple sugar.

  • Base Color: White
  • Paint Length: Long
  • Fragrance Family: Earthy, Spicy, Foodlike, Holiday

Wake-N-Waffle™
An indulgent essence of dried fruits and maple syrup infused into golden vanilla.

  • Base Color: Light Brown
  • Paint Length: Short

Wizard™
An enchanting citrus scent with notes of Sicilian bergamot, sheer yuzu, coriander spice, silver birch, atlas cedar and white musk.

  • Base Color: Natural
  • Glitter: Glitter
  • Paint Length: Short
  • Fragrance Family: Earthy, Woods, Spicy

title: Helping Friendly Pipe Helper Pipe Cleaner
description:
Product Information

Retail Unit: One (1) Bottle Case Size: 6 Bottles

Size: 16 ounces (The average 12 inch glass piece uses 2.5 ounces of fluid. One bottle will fill that piece 5 to 8 times on average. It also lasts a lot longer than tap water.)

What is it? A better alternative to water for all water pipes that helps to keep the piece clean longer and also add some flavor to the experience!

For decades journeymen and enthusiasts alike have dealt with one major issue with water operated smoking apparatus’, the water is simply gross!

Helping Friendly decided to attack this problem with science, years of research and development, and good old-fashioned American ingenuity.

The Helping Friendly Pipe Helper was born.

This nontoxic, food grade solution is perfect for use in any and all water pipes and provides a myriad of benefits over traditional H2O. At first you will notice the need for far less water changes and cleaning sessions as our pipe water cleans and prevents resin buildup with every use. You will also experience enhanced functionality from your pipe or device due to our pipe water being denser than water, which in turn produces thick, milky clouds. Lastly our Pipe Helper comes in not only unflavored, but also seven proprietary flavor options allowing you to change your overall experience while smoking from your favorite pipe.

Treat your glass better, smoke better, and vibe better with The Helping Friendly Pipe Helper!

Helping Friendly Pipe Helper Benefits: 

  • Naturally supercharged to prevent excessive resin build up
  • Non-Toxic food grade proprietary blend
  • Dense solution provides incredibly thick rips
  • All natural mold inhibitor allows for less fluid changes.

Flavors:
Original (Unflavored) - Enjoy the natural flavor of your bounty with the added benefits of
Helping Friendly Pipe Helper™!
Apple - Flavorful fujis, tart granny smiths and sweet honeycrisps come together to add that juicy flavor you won't soon forget.
Grape - A subtle mix of white grape and candied grape flavors, that hits all the right notes and will gives your smoke an extra something special.
Peppermint (Cooling Experience) - Peppermint and menthol notes will infuse a minty essence into your next hit.
Pineapple - Rich tropical flavor of sweet juicy pineapples. Slightly sweet but not overpowering. 
Sherbet - A solid blend of creamy citrus and berry fruit creates a rainbow of flavor to accompany your next smoke.
Vanilla Custard - Decadent vanilla bean and an infusion of Madagascar and Mexican Vanilla come together to give a creamy sweet mouth feel to your choice of smoke.

Scent descriptions:

420 - It’s HIGHLY likely you will love this fragrance blend of coconut milk, buttercream, fresh pastries, melted chocolate, tonka and touch of musk. So sit back, relax, and experience 420 ANY TIME!
Apple Orchard - A sweet, crisp and juicy Macintosh Apple with delightful fruit notes of Georgia peach.
Bamboo Breeze - An airy, light fragrance best described as fresh and clean.
Bermuda Beach - Lily of the Valley with Honeysuckle & pineapple notes.
Blue Serenity - Fresh and clean plumeria flower from the tropics with hints of orange and jasmine.
Cabin Nights - forged from the amber glow of a cozy campfire with the essence of nightfall musk, citron zest, and white cedar sandalwood.
Caribbean Punch - A tropical vacation captured in this cool and refreshing blend of exotic berries, black currants, red papaya, juicy orange and grapefruit nectar. You'll drift away into paradise with this fragrance!
Chill - A blend of peppermint leaf, dark cocoa and delicious vanilla sugar will lift your holiday spirit up a few notches. 
China Rain - A fragrance as exotic as the budding lotus flower.
Cinnamon Apple - A blend of the scent of spicy cinnamon sticks warming on the stove, with the fruity touches of a ripened apple.
Cinnamon Sprinkle - An aroma of spicy cinnamon bubbling out of the center of hot cinnamon rolls. 
Clothesline Fresh - A scent that reminds you of beautiful blue Spring skies, crisp Spring air, and the fresh, clean smell of laundry, sun-drying on the clothesline.
Coconut Grove - Where warm tropical breezes blow succulent fragrances of wild hibiscus, plumeria blossoms, sugared pineapple,papaya and refreshing coconut milk.
Cool Cucumber & Honeydew - A cool, refreshing hint of cucumber blended with the soft sweetness of honeydew, this one is definitely a crowd favorite!
Creamy Vanilla - The ultimate essence of vanilla in this warm, soft, and simply delicious creamy vanilla fragrance.
Dragon's Blood - A scent of incense with amber and vanilla.
Eufloria - A dreamy fragrance inspired by the mysteries of intoxication.
Evergreen & Berry - The scent of a fresh-cut pine.
Flamingo Bay - Fresh squeezed lemons, sparkling blue water lilies, warm aquatic breezes and a splash of movie star musk
Flower Power - A Bohemian Blend fragrance featuring a kaleidoscope of wild flower essences, morning dew, ylang, pink peony, amber, sandalwood, and soft patchouli, all fused together with the subtle sweetness of papaya and apricots.
Gardenia Delight -  A sweet timeless scent that softly fills the air. It is delicate, smooth, and full of exoticism. One smell and you will be transported to the tropics.
Glazed:  If you like walking into a gourmet bakery with freshly made donuts lining the shelves, you will love Glazed. Where delightful aromas of cooling pastries and vanilla butter cream filled doughnuts take over your senses.
Half Baked -  A warm and gooey combination of dark chocolate fudge, cookie dough, patchouli and sweet vanilla.
Happy Daze - Bursting with fruitiness, it's a sweet blend of lemon, mango, peach, mandarin candy, pineapple, wild melon, and vanilla.
Havana Nights - Reminiscent of bold aromas you find in your favorite tobacco shop. Sweet and woody finished off with a perfect mix of vanilla and tobacco.
HoliBlaze - A seasonal blend of bayberry, eucalyptus, cedar wood and cloves.
Hippie Love - A sweet, entrancing, and fragrant combination of tropical fruits with just a hint of spice, watermelon, and tropical fruit punch.
Island Rain - A tropical fragrance blend of rain soaked palms, bold eucalyptus, soft lavender and sweet hyacinth with a touch of cedar and tonka bean. 
Jolly Joint - A magical blend of frosted cranberries, blue spruce and iced citrus all rolled up to make this a very merry scent to enhance your holiday season
Just Like Home - A welcoming blend of spicy cinnamon, vanilla sugar and notes of orange spice swirled with a dash of eucalyptus, aromatic cloves, and just a touch of cedar.
Kiwi Twisted Strawberry - Fresh strawberries with the added tropical-tart twist of kiwi fruit.
Lavender With Chamomile - An aroma of crisp lavender, infused with chamomile. A sweet, floral fragrance. Lavender and Chamomile is a very popular, year round scent.
Maui Wowie Mango - A Hawaiian combination of juicy mango, fresh peach, and ripe pineapple.
Moonlight - A bountiful harvest of Wild Apples, White Jasmine, Rambler Roses, and Fir Needles with a glimmer of Celestial Tonka Bean, and Musk.
Mulberry & Spice - A wonderful aromatic combination of wild berries, cinnamon sticks, and bitter orange peels.
Munchies - A cornucopia of delicious fragrances you would find at your local foodie festival such as caramel and hot buttered popcorn, freshly made donuts, warm cinnamon churros, sweet dough, vanilla & more!
Nag Champa - A blending of frangipani and sandalwood scents.
Orange Lemon Splash - A unique blend of sweet oranges with a splash of tangy lemons. A sweetened, fresh, and exotic intermingling of citrus fragrances.
Patchouli Amber - A scent featuring geranium, cedar, and patchouli.
Peace & Love - Delicious black currant, Sicilian lemon, Mandarin & raspberry intertwined with star anise, Lavender, heliotrope, patchouli & cedarwood to bring you peace, love, and happiness!
Peace River - A calming and refreshing fragrance blend of waterstone, mandarin, marine accord, jasmine, patchouli, sensual must with a twist of lemon. 
Pine Island Jasmine - A delicate, sweet, and flowery aroma of tropical jasmine. It will leave you dreaming of exotic and mysterious island getaways
Pineapple Coconut - A tropical fragrance, which is a deliciously balanced blend of juicy pineapple and creamy coconut.
Potpaya - Blends creamy sweet papaya, guava nectar, Italian mandarin and fragrant orange zest with lighter notes of peach, violet and sugar crystals. 
Pumpkin & Spice -  A warm blend of buttery pumpkin with nutmeg, cinnamon, clove, and ginger.
Rasta Love - A sweet and spicy mix of Valencia oranges, coconuts, cloves, violet petals, sandalwood, golden amber, patchouli, and creamy vanilla.
Rockabilly - Blend of evening iris, blushed suede, Meukow vanilla, burgundy saffron and many other unique scents.
Sandalwood - A distinctive, soft, warm, smooth, creamy and milky precious-wood scent.
Sea Glass - Crisp ocean air with tangerine zests, cool blue waters, sea salt crystals and island jasmine drifting onto the amber sandy shores.
Southern Magnolia - A gorgeous new floral scent as beautiful as the majestic flower itself. With notes of eucalyptus, rosemary, peony and orange flower, this extravagant beauty blossoms with fragrance.
Spiced Cider - Delicious aromas of slow toasted sugar mixed with sea salt, cream and vanilla bean.
Star Struck: A celestial fragrance blend of golden bergamot, crisp McIntosh apples, sparkling citron, exotic cardamom, and spicy cinnamon leaf.
Sugar Skull - A men's cologne with notes of lavender, sandalwood, and spices.
Sugared Cranberry - A refreshing blend of fresh, tart cranberries with hints of nutmeg and ginger.
Tree of Life: Tree of Life scent surrounds you with the rustic winds of the Costa Rican rain forest, sensations of sparkling citrus, woody oak moss, fresh Emerald fir needles, and fragrant Redwood twigs.
Trippy Hippie - A sweet and tart mix of Valencia orange, sour lemon peel, and a splash of jasmine, topped off with a sprinkle of sugar.
Woodstock:  Unites the classic fragrances of citrus, bergamot, lavender & geranium and intertwines them with earthly sandalwood, piney cedarwood & throwback musk.
Yin Yang - A balanced blend of fragrances to elevate the spirit. Bergamot, lemon, lavender, geranium, patchouli, and musk.

Warm Flannel - A comforting blend of bright bergamot, dewy cyclamen, and earthy leaves, softened by violet, cozy cashmere, vanilla and sensual musk. Wrap yourself in comfort and tranquility.

Scent descriptions:
Sativa Diva - Bursting with notes of exotic fruits, citrus, and hibiscus palm!
Indica Girl - An intriguing scent that uses calming rainwater, lavender, lilies, and more!
Fluffy Loops - A luxurious, coconut apricot wax blend. It is then scented to fruity cereal greatness.
Fluffy Toast - Swirling cinnamon and sugar combine in this hand-poured candle to create an air-freshener product unlike any you've seen before!
Dog Man - Blackberry, Absinthe, Nag Champa
Fluffy Kettl'd - Yogurt Cluster, Popcorn
Blazy Bae - Clementines with fresh roses and mint

NOTE: Trim wick to 1/4" before lighting & between burns. Keep candle free of any flammable materials including but not limited to: matches and wick trimmings. Keep away from children & pets. Only burn the candle on a level, fire-resistant surface within eyesight. Do not burn candle for more than four hours at a time.

Stop use when only 1/4" of wax remains. Let candle container fully cool before picking it up after burning. Glass will be hot. Do not snuff candle with the lid provided!

title: High Hemp Organic Wraps
description:
Product Information

 

High Hemp Organic Wraps were the first ever Hemp Herbal Wrap. Made from sustainably grown European hemp imported from the Netherlands, this is the best alternative to all the harsh toxic ingredients used in traditional wraps today.

You have the smooth taste of traditional hemp rolling paper, but the even slow burn of a traditional tobacco wrap. We offer our clients the best of both worlds with our patent pending formula. High Hemp Organic Wraps is certified organic, tobacco free, GMO-free, and gluten free. These measures give our paper some of the highest purity ratings in the market today! We have tested positive for low dosages of CBD, making our paper first of its kind!

  • Retail Unit: 25 Packs. Each pack contains 2 wraps.

title: Ultra Eliminex Same-Day Detox
description:
Product Information 

Herbal Clean’s Ultra Eliminex Premium Detox drink is THE premium, one day detox system for people with high toxin levels or large body mass.

There is nothing more powerful than our elite total body cleanse formula. Ultra Eliminex Premium Detox contains the strongest blend of herbal formulations to flush through your body; cleansing and helping rid your system of toxins.

ULTRA ELIMINEX INSTRUCTIONS:
For the best same-day detox results, please follow these three easy steps:

  1. Shake well and drink the entire content of the bottle at a comfortable yet consistent pace during the course of 30 minutes to 1 hour.
  2. Be sure to urinate frequently; this is a part of the elimination process and important to a successful cleanse.
  3. Now your body has achieved the optimum level of cleanse on the very same day.

Important Tips:

  • Part of a successful cleanse is how well you stick to the detox plan.
  • Make sure you follow the instructions and the tips below.
  • When cleansing the system, it is important to drink as much daily water as possible.
  • Avoid unwanted toxins.
  • Best when taken on an empty stomach; however if you have a sensitive stomach, you may eat something light.
  • Do not eat any large meals before using this product.
  • If you are taking any over the counter medication, consult your physician before using Ultra Eliminex.
  • Do not consume large quantities of vitamins, alcohol, acidic liquids such as vinegar or juices, nicotine, caffeine or other unwanted toxins prior to the use of this product.

Warnings:

  • Do not use this product if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, have kidney or gallbladder disorder or disease.
  • This product is not recommended for prolonged use.
  • This product is made with botanical herbs.
  • When using this product you may experience nausea, dizziness, diarrhea or cramping. If you start to experience any of these symptoms, discontinue use of product immediately. If symptoms persist seek medical assistance.
  • As with all herbal supplements, this product is not recommended for children without the supervision of a parent or guardian.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Not intended for daily use.

title: Grunge Off Super Soaker
description:
Product Information



Our exclusive formula cleans away grungy build-up and cuts through residue rapidly to get sparkling clean results.

  • Bottle Size: 16oz
  • Alcohol free
  • Formulated exclusively for glass products
  • No harmful abrasives
  • No shaking or scrubbing to clean
  • Biodegradable
  • Deodorizes and sanitizes

DIRECTIONS:

  • Pour into affected item
  • Shield/cover openings to avoid leakage
    • Note: Place small items into a GLASS container and fill with Grunge Off
  • Do not add water
  • Allow to soak until sparkling clean
  • Rinse thoroughly with warm water
  • Wash hands after each use

title: Grav Pocket Rig
description:
Product Information

 

Compatible with: GRAV Bangers

GRAV Wedge Rig (WBR.0)

The Wedge Rig is perfect for quick dabs and can be held comfortably inany way. The smooth angles of this minimalistic rig make it feel great inyour hand, and the narrow shape helps to deliver a hit as soon as youinhale.

The curved downstem reaches the very corner of the rig's bottomchamber, so you can use a low water level. Pull as hard as you like fromthis little rig without any chance of splashback.

  • Size: 5" x 2"
  • Joint: 14mm Female
  • Use With: Concentrate
  • Includes: 14mm 45-degree Male Quartz Banger
  • Filtration: Fixed 4 hole downstem
  • Designed By: Micah Evans
  • Thickness: 3mm
  • Low water line for exceptional flavor

GRAV Eclipse Rig (ECLR.0)

The Eclipse Dab Rig is a compact and portable rig that brings thecosmic experience to the palm of your hand. The spherical chamberfeatures a mesmerizing 8-hole conical-shaped perc that filters vaporinto swirling galaxies.

The rounded design is easy to hold but sits nicely on the table. This righas a short mouthpiece to deliver flavorful hits with even the slightestinhale. Have fun on your journey to the moon!

  • Size: 3.5" x 3.5"
  • Joint: 14mm Female
  • Use With: Concentrate
  • Includes: 14mm 45-degree Male Quartz Banger
  • Filtration: Fixed 8 hole downstem
  • Designed By: Micah Evans
  • Thickness: 3mm
  • Ergonomic Shape

GRAV Hourglass Pocket Rig (PBHR.0)

Savor the moment with the Hourglass Pocket Rig from GRAV. Small rigs justhit differently. This dab rig's compact shape helps intensify flavors anddeliver a long and tasty dab.

The Hourglass Rig fits comfortably in your hand,and the specially designed mouthpiece prevents splashing back. This minidab rig is perfect for on-the-go or at-home use. It comes with a flat-topquartz banger.

  • Size: 4" x 2.5"
  • Joint: 10mm Female
  • Use With: Concentrate
  • Includes: 10mm 90-degree Male Quartz Banger
  • Filtration: Fixed 2 hole downstem
  • Designed By: Micah Evans
  • Thickness: 3mm
  • Low water line for exceptional flavor
  • Ergonomic Shape

    This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

title: Grav Carb Caps
description:
Product Information

 

Featuring a signature form by the internationally known glass blower and designer Micah Evans, the GRAV® Yoyo Carb Cap is perfect for pairing with a heady rig or daily driver. 

This directional airflow carb cap will bring out the best of your concentrates by improving the quality and control of your concentrate. By trapping and retaining heat, the user can maneuver the carb cap around to modify airflow, which improves convection at lower temperatures. This gives those smooth and flavorful, milky white draws. 

  • Retail Unit: One (1) Carb Cap
  • Size: 25mm x 57mm

The GRAV Coffee Mug Pocket Bubbler has a unique design resembling a miniature coffee or espresso cup. The shape adds whimsy to your smoking experience and is easy to loop a finger through and hold casually.

Not only is this pocket bubbler visually appealing, but it also provides smooth hits thanks to its aggressive percolator downstem. The percolator diffuses the smoke, cooling it downand making for a more enjoyable hit.

title: Grav Slush Cup Pocket Bubbler
description:
Product Information

 

GRAV Slush Cup Pocket Bubbler (PBSC.0)

The GRAV® Slush Cup Pocket Bubbler shrinks down the form of the original while keeping all the power. This small slush cup has all the features of the original redesigned into a fun handheld size that still packs tasty hits.

In addition, this little pipe has a thick mouthpiece and extra reinforced walls making it one of the densest glass pipes we make.
The angled downstem of the Slush Cup helps prevent water from splashing back. It's easy to find the sweet spot for this bubbler
pipe because the percolator works wonders with a low water line.

title: Grav Hook Hitter
description:

title: Grav Gravitron
description:
GRAV® LARGE GRAVITRON® (G04.V2)

The world's first all-glass gravity smoking system got a facelift. This new and improved version 2.0 Gravitron® boasts a fivefold increase in glass thickness and upgraded platinum cured silicone grommet for a tighter seal. The 19 mm female ground joint now fits any 19 mm male bowl and the flange at the top of the neck makes lifting the bottle a breeze.

The Gravitron creates big, efficient hits though gravity and pressure. Start by filling the base halfway with water. Then pack the bowl with dry herb and insert it into the joint at the neck of the bottle. Light the bowl and lift the bottle at the same time. Once the bottle is full of smoke, remove the bowl and place your mouth over the neck, inhaling as you lower the bottle. The Gravitron will give you a dense, pressurized hit with no loss of smoke in the process.

Although it's the ultimate party pipe, the Gravitron is still considered one of the most efficient smoking devices on the market today.

  • Size: 11" Tall
  • Joint Size: 19mm
  • Includes: 19mm funnel bowl
  • Silicone grommet

GRAV® MEDIUM GRAVITRON® (G03.V2)

This is the smaller version of the large Gravitron, but it still packs the same kind of punch you'd expect from a gravity smoking system. This new and improved version 2.0 Gravitron® boasts a fivefold increase in glass thickness and upgraded platinum cured silicone grommet for a tighter seal. The 14 mm female ground joint now fits any 14 mm male bowl and the flange at the top of the neck makes lifting the bottle a breeze.

The Gravitron creates big, efficient hits though gravity and pressure. Start by filling the base halfway with water. Then pack the bowl with dry herb and insert it into the joint at the neck of the bottle. Light the bowl and lift the bottle at the same time. Once the bottle is full of smoke, remove the bowl and place your mouth over the neck, inhaling as you lower the bottle. The Gravitron will give you a dense, pressurized hit with no loss of smoke in the process.

Although it's the ultimate party pipe, the Gravitron is still considered one of the most efficient smoking devices on the market today.

  • Size: 9"

  • Includes: 14mm funnel bowl
  • Silicone grommet

This piece includes a 14mm GRAV® Cup Bowl, so once you have your Round Base Water Pipe all you need to add is about 1.5" of water and you're good to go. Trust us, you won't want to wait.

title: Terp Wipes 70-Pack
description:
Product Information

 

Retail Unit: 1 box contains 70 individually packaged swabs and 3 cleaning sticks.

Size / Material: 2.5" x 2.5" Cotton Wipes

Cleaning Solution: 75% ethyl alcohol / 25% distilled water

Terp Wipes are thick single-use cotton wipes. The Ethyl alcohol solution combined with the thickness of the wipes makes them far more absorbent than regular alcohol wipes. Terp Wipes are safe for use with glass, quartz, metal, drip tips and hands.

Ethyl alcohol is grain-based, non-toxic and food safe. It also evaporates more slowly than Isopropyl Alcohol (iso), allowing for more time to use the wipe after it's opened.

title: Cricket Pocket Dab Rig Vaporizer
description:
Product Information

 

Compatible with: Evolv Cricket Replacement Parts, Evolv Cricket Tub Assembly

Made in Ohio, the Cricket is the cannabis connoisseur's dream device.

 

The Cricket is the most advanced all-in-one pocket dab rig ever created. Taste every terp with tightly controlled temperature handled by the most sophisticated chipset for dabs that has ever existed. It's airflow is designed to deliver waterpipe smooth hits and dense vapor without any harshness.

The heating technology ensures that over 90% of the concentrate is delivered to the user so there's very little wasted material and small dabs have a big impact.

The heating changes heats up and down extremely quickly. Within 5 seconds, you can take a puff and put it back into your pocket without any worries about hot liquid leaking out.

It also features built in concentrate storage and a built in loading tool.

title: Stundenglass Gravity Infuser
description:
Product Information

 

** This brand requires that all warranty claims be handled with them directly. Please see this help article for more information. **

Compatible with: Stündenglass Wall Mounts, Stündenglass Maintenance Kits, Stündenglass Cloches, Stündenglass Infusion Chambers, Stündenglass Glass Globes, Stündenglass Hoses and Hose Parts, Stündenglass Upstems, Stündenglass LED Uplight, Stündenglass Ash Catcher

Stündenglass® is honored to introduce the Gravity Infuser, a sophisticated and elegantly designed 360° rotating glass infuser that generates kinetic motion activation via cascading water displacement, opposing airflow technology and the natural force of gravity. Constructed using the highest quality materials, including borosilicate glass globes and aircraft-grade anodized aluminum, the Stündenglass Gravity Infuser elicits an immersive experience while delivering smooth, consistent and vaporous draws.

Designed for functional versatility, the Stündenglass Gravity Infuser is a complete set that includes an aluminum bowl kit and a glass liner, but can also connect to any smoking or vaporization device with a 14mm male joint. Included is a 3-foot silicone hose that can be connected for direct draws, though a steady stream of smoke through the 45° adjustable mouthpiece affords the optionality for entirely contactless consumption.

description:

At the heart of the Atomic9 is a revolutionary and patent-pending “Dual Layer” heating technology that combines the vapor consistency of convection heating with the space and energy efficiency of conduction heating. It creates a hybrid heating process without the large battery and heating path requirement of a standard convection heating vaporizer, resulting in the smallest and most cost-effective convection heating vaporizer currently on the market.

title: Puffco Proxy
description:
Product Information

 

** This brand requires that all warranty claims be handled with them directly. Please see this help article for more information. **

Compatible with: PuffCo Proxy 3D Chamber, PuffCo Proxy Travel Pack, PuffCo Proxy Ball Cap, PuffCo Proxy Glass, PuffCo Proxy Flower Bowl, MJ Arsenal Proxy Bubbler, PuffCo Proxy Travel Pipe, PuffCo Proxy Wizard Pipe, PuffCo Proxy Replacement Glass

The Puffco Proxy is a portable, modular vaporizer that provides broad flexibility for your herbal consumption experience. Herbal tradition meets innovation with an elegant, ergonomic glass pipe that cradles the Proxy’s unique removable base, allowing you to customize your experience with an ecosystem of compatible Puffco accessories and third-party artist glass. Powered by our cutting-edge 3D Chamber technology, the Proxy has four precision heated temperatures settings for the most flavorful experience and vapor production.

title: MJ Arsenal The Martian® Original Blunt Bubbler™
description:
The Martian Original Blunt Bubbler is a pioneering device that revolutionized smoking technology by bringing water filtration to the timeless tradition of smoking a rolled cone. 

Being the first of its kind, this unique blunt bubbler set the standard for all blunt bubblers.

The Martian Bubbler adapts to almost all rolled items, transforming your conventional smoking methods into a more advanced, flavorful experience. It can also function as a super portable one hitter.

As stylish as it is functional, it features a pendant hook for accessorizing or convenient transportation. Its spill-resistant design ensures a smooth, mess-free session, reaffirming its superiority over its many imitators.

The ergonomically placed carb hole supports a natural grip, making your smoking experience comfortable and intuitive. With dual-functionality as both a standard and directional airflow carb cap, it offers unmatched versatility.

The Martian Original Blunt Bubbler continues to bring a new dimension to sessions, functioning flawlessly as a Cone Bubbler or one hitter. It adds a layer of water filtration to your smoke, delivering a smoother, cooler, and more enjoyable draw, setting it apart from the crowd.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass
Dimensions: 2.25in x 2.5in x 1.25in

What’s in the box:
The Martian Blunt Bubbler

Protected by USPTO D820,513.

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.


    What is the Martian® Mini Blunt Bubbler?

    The Martian® is the perfect solution for smokers who love the smooth hits and rich flavor of water pipes but want the hard hits that sometimes come with your favorite botanicals. 

    Each inhale is smoother and cooler than a typical rollie, so no more scorching the back of your throat when you take in too much at once. Instead, this piece features a water filtration system similar to your favorite bong to make your smoking experience more enjoyable.

    Fitting almost any rolled product, you can take your flower-frenzy to the next level with this MJ Arsenal little bubbler. Fill up to the water level, insert, and light up.

    The Out-of-this-World Features of the Martian® Original Blunt Bubbler™

    One-Hitter

    Our MJ Arsenal mini joint bubblers are perfect for joints and one-hitter smoke sessions, allowing you to customize your experience.

    Spill-Resistant

    The Martian’s spill-resistant design keeps water inside the mouth piece instead of on your couch.

    Compact & On-the-Go

    This cute little bubbler is compact, fitting in the palm of your hand, making it easier to transport and a breeze to clean!

    What’s the Hype Around the Martian®?

    This MJ Arsenal exclusive works great for any herb-lover looking to transition to bubblers, taking their hits to the next level.

    Bubblers offer a stunning mix between smoking a traditional water pipe and a dry pipe, allowing you to enjoy the healthiest and smoothest rips. 

    Each plumb of smoke filters through the water, filling the little bubbler with flavorful smoke from your favorite herb.

title: MJ Arsenal Dubbler Original Double Bubbler
description:
The Dubbler takes the original Martian® Bubbler concept to another galaxy! The Dubbler is double the rip, twice the pull and a truly out of this world experience.

This blunt bubbler fits perfectly with most cones and rolled products and adds water filtration to your smoke to deliver smoother, cooler, and more enjoyable draws.

Two frosted tip connections make for the most secure connections possible. The Dubbler features a pendant hook for accessorizing or convenient transportation. Its spill-resistant design ensures a smooth, mess-free session.

An ergonomically placed carb hole supports a natural grip with dual-functionality as both a standard and directional airflow carb cap.
