title: MJ Arsenal King Bubbler
description:
Building on the popularity of The Martian® Bubbler, The King Bubbler takes it back to Giza to empower everyone to be their own Cone Pharaohs. Long live the King!

The King has a double slit function for unique bubbler action in a blunt bubbler. It fits perfectly with most cones and rolled products and adds water filtration to your smoke to deliver smoother, cooler, and more enjoyable draws.

A frosted tip connection makes for a secure connection with rolled products. The King Bubbler features a spill-resistant design to ensure a smooth, mess-free session.

An ergonomically placed carb hole supports a natural grip with dual-functionality as both a standard and directional airflow carb cap.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass
Dimensions: 2.25in x 2in x 1.55in

What’s in the box:
The King Bubbler

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.


    Introducing The King Himself

    If you love the convenience of a traditional dry blunt but want the benefits of a water rig, The King blunt bubbler may be the perfect pipe for you.  

    The King is a raw cone bubbler, which means your session will be a fun and unique blend of dry and water smoking, allowing you to get more out of your fresh flower.

    Standing at a stout two inches tall, this handmade cone bubbler can take any rolled delicacy to the next level by evening out and cooling each hit.

    What Makes The King Bubbler Stand Out?

    Though all of our MJA rigs pack big punches and unique features, going full force with a dab rig may not be suitable for every occasion. But that all changes when The King cone bubbler comes in. 

    Plus, all MJA products are made from extra thick borosilicate glass, making this compact and transportable bubbler perfect for every occasion. Whether lighting up in a group setting or hitting it hard at home, The King cone bubbler has you covered.

    No Harsh Hits

    This mini cone bubbler is considered royalty for many reasons, including its smooth, impactful hits. The bubbles created by the water can help dissipate the smoke, which can help prevent water splash on your blunt and mouth.

    Small – But Mighty

    Like King Tut, The King Bubbler is a hard hitter despite its small stature. It draws daily smokers in with its sleek and easy-to-use design. You will be shocked at the power behind each pull, and you can more easily control intake with smaller cone bubblers.

    High-Quality Design

    With its etched conical cone holder, extra-thick borosilicate glass, and unique water break ridge, this raw cone bubbler is a one-of-a-kind purchase.

    The Unique Features of The King Cone Bubbler

    This unique raw cone bubbler is jam-packed with great features that will have you writing a rave review as soon as you take your first rip.

    Handmade by our glass-blowing technicians out of extra thick borosilicate glass, The King is an amazingly durable, dependable mini water pipe for everyday use.

    With a fixed downstem to stop water splashes and extra-strength ridges to avoid breaking, The King is truly unbeatable.

    Perfect for Group Settings

    This tiny titan is similar in stature to a lighter, allowing you to take this rig on the go and into group sessions. Though you can pass around raw cones, you run the risk of a mushy tip and unwanted germs.

    With a cone bubbler, you have a built-in holder so your cone tip can stay dry and a mouthpiece that can be wiped down between smokers.

    Important Note: Though this MJA bubbler doesn’t have attachments available, there is no need for any additional accessories because this piece is an all-in-one experience. Simply grab your rolled product, place it in the downstem opening, and light up.

    How To Use The King Raw Cone Bubbler

    When using any MJ Arsenal product, setup and execution are simple and easy.

    1. First, fill The King cone bubbler with a small amount of water — enough for continuous bubbles when pulling.
    2. Next, roll your favorite rolled herb concoction (Note: The King bubbler fits most products)
    3. Place your blunt inside the etched conical cone holder (it’s like the receiver on your water pipe) connected to the downstem, ensuring it fits snugly.
    4. Light the end of your blunt, creating an even burn around the perimeter of the paper.
    5. Once your blunt is lit, watch as the smoke fills up the chamber. Inhale through the bubbler’s mouthpiece, sit back, and relax as your blunt takes you higher than ever before.

    Want a more detailed run-through? Check out our guide on bubblers.

    What to Expect From the Commander Joint Bubbler

    Perfect Mix Between Your Favorite Tools

    The Commander mini joint bubbler is a high-quality hand-blown borosilicate glass piece perfect for blunt lovers looking for a mix between a dry bong and a water rig. 

    One-Size-Fits-All

    With a stunning frosted cone, triple slit perc, and easy-to-use design, our mini joint bubblers are perfect daily drivers for beginners and seasoned smokers.

    Compact & On-the-Go

    Like a mini bong, a mini joint bubbler is a mobile device perfect for on-the-go sessions because of its compact and durable design.

    The Unique Perks of the Commander

    Why use a mini joint bubbler instead of diving directly into your toke? A glass bubbler cools and clarifies each inhale, leaving you with a pure and potent session. 

    Ultimately, you get the best of both worlds, mixing the benefits of water pipes and full-bodied rips, leaving you with a little bubbler you won’t want to put down.

title: MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Dab Rig
description:
The Hydra Mini Rig is a nod to the mythical Hydra. This legendary beast, is known for its many heads, symbolizes strength and resilience and our Hydra mini rig is designed for robust performance and durability. This highly functional Klein recycler mini dab rig tames hot vapors with a cyclone of cool water.

Despite its compact size, the multiple filtration tubes and double intake recycler mechanism can handle big, flavorful hits with minimal drag. This innovative design ensures quality concentrate flavor without splash or irritation.

The unique arm placement of the Hydra mini rig reduces splashes, making it among our most spill-resistant bubblers. You’re ensured a smooth and uninterrupted dabbing experience, whether you're a beginner or seasoned user.

Featuring a triple-hole percolator to cool vapor through bubble stacking, the Hydra mini rig eliminates harsh smoke, creating an experience as tenacious as its namesake. The rear-mounted side pipe provides additional splash protection, ensuring a session as smooth as the mythical creature's resilience.

Seamlessly balancing aesthetic appeal with superior performance, the Hydra’s double uptake Klein recycler and wide-mouth design help to balance vapor cooling with flavor preservation. 

Experience the tenacity of the Hydra, the mythical creature, embodied in our Hydra Mini Rig and tame the heat of your concentrates just like the mythical Hydra tamed the flames.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass
Joint: 10mm
Dimensions: 4.5in x 3.in x 3in

What’s in the box:
Hydra Mini Dab Rig
Mini Rig Standard Quart Bucket
Flat Carb Cap

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

What is the MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Rig?

If you're a fan of our classic recycler rigs but want to spice up your setup, look no further than the MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Dab Rig. 

This top-of-the-line mini dab rig is an ergonomic, visually thrilling piece of glassware with multiple filtration tubes leading up toward the mouthpiece. With a double intake recycler mechanism, the Hydra mini dab rig tames hot vapors easily — packing big hits with as little drag as possible.

Between its spill-resistant bubbler, uniquely placed perc arm, and ultra-compact design, you can experience the sweet taste of quality concentrate without splashing or irritation.

What's the Hype Around the Hydra?

The Hydra Mini Dab Rig is a brand new take on single recycler rigs, with multiple filtration tubes for double the airflow. This thoughtful design creates a spectacular turbine effect as you inhale clean, flavorful hits. 

This MJ Arsenal mythical beast was built with performance in mind, featuring unique arm placement for fewer splashes. The Hydra mini dab rig is our most spill-resistant bubbler to date! 

Because of its distinctive design, the MJ Arsenal Hydra mini dab rig continues to be one of our top-selling products for newbies and seasoned dabbers alike.

What Features Make the Hydra Mini Rig Stand Out?

The MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Dab Rig packs big hits, featuring mechanics designed with a higher standard in mind. 

But what makes the Hydra mini rigs stand out amongst other MJ Arsenal pieces? Whether it's the sleek, swirling design or the sensation of a smooth hit — the Hydra Mini Rig from MJA has it all. 

Triple Hole Perc

When it comes to solo sessions, nothing harshes a buzz more than a piping-hot hit straight to the back of the throat. 

Though high heats are necessary for a potent pull, the MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Rig uses a triple hole perc to cool vapor through bubble stacking, effectively eliminating harsh smoke.

Not only will you get an eye-catching bubble explosion, but you will also experience smooth, cough-free hits. 

Rear-Mounted Side-Pipe

Though all of our MJ Arsenal collections feature splash guards to protect your mouth from unwanted droplets, the Hydra Mini Rig from MJA has additional built-in protection with its rear-mounted side pipe. 

Because of the pipe's rear position, splashing is a thing of the past. The MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Dab Rig paves the way for a splash-and-spill-free zone, allowing you to enjoy every session without mess-induced stress.

Double Uptake Recycler Glass Design

Though the MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Rig may be small, its performance proves that quality glass design matters more than size.

The Hydra Mini Rig features a double uptake Klein recycler wide-mouth design that simultaneously cools vapor and preserves the flavor profile of dab. 

Plus, on top of quality performance, the MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Rig is the perfect statement piece for any dab-enthusiasts collection, with stunning flows and crystal-clear glassware.

MJA Accessories for the Hydra Mini Rig

Here at MJ Arsenal, our accessories are tailor-made to connect with various products, allowing you to mix and match which components you combine. 

For example, grabbing an additional banger or bucket for your MJ Arsenal Hydra mini rig can be helpful in a pinch. Or — if you're looking to preserve every last ounce of dab — consider a cap to cut down on wasted product.

MJ Arsenal Hydra Mini Dab Rig Specifications

  • Height: 4 inches
  • Base width: 2.5 inches
  • 10mm connection
  • Make harsh smoke a myth with the triple-hole perc!
  • The first purpose-built mini rig™ from MJA, the Hydra is a Klein recycler
  • Wide and sturdy base
  • Rear-mounted side-pipe to prevent spills\

If you want to save even more, get a bundle pack. MJ Arsenal has the perfect mini dab rig bundle pack for you, so get yours today!

*For tobacco use only

title: MJ Arsenal Hydra Vape Edition
description:
The Hydra Vape Edition is an exciting adaptation of our renowned Hydra Mini Dab Rig. This ingenious device was inspired by a creative journalist from High Times magazine and converts any typical vaporizer pen into a compact, highly efficient dab rig.

Inspired by the multifaceted mythical creature, the Hydra symbolizes durability and strength. Designed for robust performance, this rig utilizes a Klein recycler to soften hot vapors with a water vortex, offering an unparalleled vaping experience.

The versatile female spout caters to most circular tip vaporizers, seamlessly enhancing your vaporizer pen's functionality. Despite its small stature, the rig ensures substantial, flavorful hits with little drag through its multiple filtration tubes and dual-intake recycler mechanism. This innovative design guarantees a splash-free, pleasant vaping session.

The Hydra, famous for its unique arm placement, ranks as one of our most spill-resistant bubblers. Equipped with a triple-hole percolator, it cools vapor via bubble stacking, eliminating harsh smoke for a smooth vaping experience. Its rear-mounted side pipe further prevents splashes, ensuring every session is as seamless as the mythical beast's resilience.

The magic happens when you insert your vaporizer, pull, and witness the production of massive clouds. Filtering your vapor through water delivers an incredibly smooth hit, eliminating harshness and enhancing flavor. This process creates a smoother, more enjoyable smoking experience, typically found in larger, stationary dab rigs but now accessible in a portable format.

Blending aesthetics and performance, the Hydra’s double uptake Klein recycler and wide-mouth design synergistically cool vapors while preserving flavor, truly embodying the essence of its namesake. Experience a vaping revolution with the Hydra Vape Edition Rig.

title: MJ Arsenal Atlas Mini Dab Rig
description:
Introducing the Atlas Mini Rig by MJ Arsenal—an innovative, compact, and portable dab rig. Crafted with high-quality borosilicate glass, this rig stands at just 5 inches tall, yet offers substantial hits with effortless ease.

The Atlas's unique double ball design serves a functional purpose, ensuring water remains in close contact with the vapors for maximum filtration while preventing any from entering your mouth. Its wider 2.4-inch base provides enhanced stability, allowing for the addition of attachments without the risk of tipping over.

Innovative features like the 360-degree honeycomb-style percolator enable maximum filtration with minimal drag, diffusing and separating the smoke for a smooth, cough-free inhale. The distinctive Faberge body design further aids in the diffusion process, amplifying the flavor of your concentrate.

The Atlas Rig's double ball perc design also guards against splashes, keeping your hits dry. Despite its compact size, the Atlas Rig provides a voluminous chamber, guaranteeing optimal airflow and a clean, smooth inhale every time. Ideal for on-the-go or at-home sessions, the Atlas Mini Rig effortlessly blends style, functionality, and convenience.

The Atlas Mini Rig is a preferred choice for seasoned smokers seeking a more potent hit without compromising on quantity. Its martini slide, along with a quartz or metal nail, makes it an exemplary choice over traditional bongs.

Whether you're looking to start your glass collection, gift a friend, or simply elevate your own smoking sessions, the Atlas Mini Rig is an easy-to-clean, aesthetically pleasing, and effective choice that promises a potent, flavorful hit every time.

What Is the Atlas Mini Ball Rig?

The Atlas Mini Ball rig is the perfect blend of form and function, making your toke the smoothest and most generous session yet. Despite its compact, lightweight, and portable size, the glass Atlas Mini Ball Rig offers some of the largest hits that go down effortlessly.

Reviews of the Atlas Mini Ball Rig show that this ball rig is one of the best options in the market for your smoking sessions. Its beautiful design and innovative features make smoking an enjoyable activity for those 21 years or older. 

That's all thanks to the Atlas Rig features, which are constantly being redesigned and improved. Its unique glass water pipe designs offer a dry and seamless vapor experience. The martini slide makes smoking easy, while its other features contribute to a rig that's both attractive and functional.

The Atlas Rig has a wider 2.4 inch base for improved stability. You can add attachments to our new and improved design without having to worry about the piece tipping over. Even though the glass rig is smaller, it holds more volume, so you experience optimal airflow in a compact shape.

The rig's double ball piece helps it stand out, but they're primarily designed to keep water in contact with vapors within the dab rig. These double balls act as a splash guard and water filtration system. The ingenious design stops water from leaking into the air path. Instead, water remains where it's supposed to and the end experience is a smooth, clean inhale.

While designing the Atlas Rig product, we chose a 360-degree honeycomb-style percolator. The honeycomb perc gives you maximum filtration with little to no drag. 

Dozens of small holes on the honeycomb perc further diffuse and separate the smoke, so you can expect an easy, smooth inhale without coughing.  The innovative Faberge design choice for the body further diffuses the smoke and water, which enhances the flavor of your concentrate.

The Atlas Rig's small shape makes it easy to take it on the go or while you're relaxing at home. Wherever you are, make your smoking an experience to remember with the Atlas Mini Ball Rig.

Atlas Mini Ball Rig Features

We used the highest quality borosilicate glass to create our stylish double ball mini rig. With a height of approximately 4 inches, a base width of 2.4 inches, and a 10mm connection, the glass Atlas Mini Ball Rig is the perfect portable, at-home bubbler that holds its own and offers a flavorful hit every time.

The Atlas Mini Ball Rig's double ball perc design also guards you against splashes, keeping your hits dry, while the honeycomb percolator makes it effortless to handle larger hits full of flavor.

  • Height: ~4 inches
  • Base width: 2.4 inches
  • Connection: 10mm
  • Material: Borosilicate glass
  • Double ball as a glass splash guard
  • Honeycomb disc percolator for handling large hits

Why Use a Ball Rig?

Those who enjoy their smoking experiences and have acquired a higher tolerance could find out that the traditional bong doesn't satisfy their smoke cravings.

Enter the glass ball rig, a much better choice for seasoned smokers.

The glass ball rig is suitable for those who want something a little more potent. As opposed to the bong, the ball rig allows you to decrease quantity while increasing the effect of the hit. Depending on its type, a glass ball rig has a solid base for good grip. The ball is shaped for optimal airflow,  with a quartz or metal nail, and the slide. For the Atlas mini ball rig, this would be the martini slide.

Glass ball rigs provide a diffused and smooth airflow so that you can inhale a smaller quantity but experience a more potent effect. Those who love bongs without the smell will appreciate that the glass ball rig dampens the scent so it doesn't linger.

Glass ball rigs do have a few extra elements, which may require you to get a bit comfortable learning. However, exploring the features during a smoke session can help you get used to its operation. Many people who choose a glass ball rig love the item because of its design. You can even start your glass collection to become a true connoisseur or gift this item to a friend.

People find that ball rigs are easy to clean and maintain. They're uncomplicated enough to effectively use a cotton swab when cleaning out any extra quantity of oil left at the end.

title: MJ Arsenal Royale Mini Dab Rig

Hot vapor and cool water are harmoniously combined within these chambers, delivering a smooth and clean pull with each use.

Crafted from high-quality borosilicate glass, the Royale Mini Dab Rig boasts durability and longevity. Its broad 2.4-inch base ensures stability, perfect for precise, controlled dabbing.

Beyond its primary filtration, the Royale excels with its secondary filtration. It houses a base-connected percolator and a fab egg-style percolator, both working together to create a bubbly action for extra cooling and smoke dispersion. This superior two-step filtration results in smoother, cooler, and more enjoyable hits.

A built-in splash guard ensures your sessions remain clean and grime-free, while the integrated oil catcher simplifies clean-up and prevents sticky residue buildup. These thoughtful additions highlight our commitment to an elevated, hassle-free vaping experience.

Compact yet power-packed, the Royale Mini Dab Rig perfectly blends style and functionality. Its discreet yet captivating design makes it an ideal companion for on-the-go sessions, while its reliable performance and easy maintenance have won the hearts of many users.

The Royale Mini Dab Rig offers a transformative dabbing experience, balancing visual appeal with superior performance, and primary filtration with efficient secondary filtration. Welcome smoother hits, less coughing, and more enjoyable sessions.

What Is the Royale Mini Dab Rig?

If you're looking for the perfect piece of glass, look no further. This elegant mini rig has a fab egg-style filtration system that creates bubbling action and cooling water filtration. It's made by expert glassmakers using dense, high-grade borosilicate glass.

This rig comes with a 10 mm banger, but it's also compatible with nails and e-nails for various dabbing options. Check out what makes the Royale one of our best sellers.

Elevate the Ordinary with the Royale Mini Rig

The Royale Mini Dab Rig is a 5-inch high banger hanger dab rig with a built-in splash guard. It's made from thick, high-quality borosilicate glass that is slowly cooled over a long period to ensure the glass is durable and impact-resistant.

It has a built-in oil catcher, a base-connected percolator, and a filtration disc-style perc that breaks up smoke with bubbling action and even more cooling.

The 2.4-inch glass base is wider than your standard rig because we wanted to ensure this piece had a stable foundation. The extra space also comes in handy for control and precision when you're dabbing. This rig comes with a 10 mm female receiver that's perfect for your favorite banger or nail.

The Royale Mini is perfect for a long session, as it comes equipped with a splash guard to keep your banger grime-free. Plus, it offers superior cooling thanks to its egg-style percolator and smooth bubbling action.

This little rig is very discreet, but it's still visually appealing and definitely made for strong dabbing. It's easy to clean, nice to look at, and simple to use—the perfect addition to any glass collection.

Here's what our fans have to say about the Royale mini dab rig:

"I bought this little dab rig to use with a nail. It's perfect for my needs! The quality feels great and I really love the design, too."

"This is like a mini version of one of those super expensive rigs you see on Instagram. It's about half the size, which makes it super easy to take with me anywhere I'm going or hide out of the way. It's perfect!"

"I bought this rig right when it first came out and I'm so glad I did. It's my favorite piece of glass to use to dab off an e-nail. The glass is so thick, the design is awesome, it's easy to clean—I love everything about my Royale mini rig."

Royale Mini Dab Rig Features

The Royale is so much more than a gorgeous piece. It's also a functional dabbing powerhouse. It has an oil catcher on the side that catches any residue, along with a filtration system made out of the egg-shaped percolator. This helps cool down your hit, resulting in more control and less coughing.

Splash Guard

No more worries about oil splashing or getting your face wet: the Royale Mini dab rig comes with a splash guard, which is basically a mini wall that keeps excess resin, residue, and water from splashing up into the mouthpiece. This feature also helps keep the rig fresh between uses.

Built-In Oil Catch

The Royale Mini dab rig also has a built-in oil catcher that collects excess oil drips from the nail or banger and prevents them from reaching the lower chamber. This makes cleaning up a lot easier and helps prevent any sticky messes that are tough to clean out of your rig.

Base-Connected Perc

The base-connected perc is a patented filtration system that's built into the bottom of the rig. It helps break up smoke with bubbles and cool water filtration, which results in more control over your dab hits. This also allows you to take bigger rips without coughing as much. The base is 2.4 inches thick, so it gives you extra stability and room for error when moving your rig.

Benefits of a Secondary Filtration Fab Egg Rig

You're going to be inhaling a lot of vapor, so it's a good idea to have an extra layer of filtration. Using the base-connected perc helps break up your smoke with tiny bubbles for an overall smoother experience.

Dispersing the vapor particles creates more surface area for the water and air to interact with. Since there's more surface area, it means the smoke will cool down much faster than if you were only using primary filtration, which cools water simply by creating turbulence inside the chamber.

The secondary filtration in this dab rig results from the fab egg style perc connected to the base.

The durability is excellent compared to tree or helix percs that many dab rigs use. Fabb egg percs also don’t clog up with residue as much as other styles of percolators do.

Best Accessories for Your Royale Mini Rig

What is the Jammer Mini Dab Rig?

For those who like to keep their dab rigs simple, the Jammer is a small and efficient way to get smooth rips. It's made from high-quality borosilicate glass and includes a quartz nail so you can enjoy different types of concentrates without having to purchase any extra accessories.

The Jammer is a no-frills design brought to you by MJ Arsenal. Featuring a simple base-connected percolator, the device delivers vapor straight through the mouthpiece without secondary filtration or recycling.

The MJ Arsenal Jammer Mini Rig is remarkably small when compared to other models. It measures just 4.25 inches in height and has a 10mm joint which means it'll fit perfectly with quartz bangers of the same size.

Just like larger rigs, this mini rig features a threaded downstem that's fully welded into the base. The design keeps it strong after repeated use. Thanks to the wide open space inside and the lack of interior tubing, it's easier to clean than any other dab rig you can find.

If you’re looking for a quick and easy way to get your daily dabs, the Jammer will deliver a strong hit of pure vapor leaving you relaxed and ready to take on whatever your day brings.

What Our Customers Say About the Jammer

Don't just take our word for it—check out what customers are saying about the Jammer miniature dab rig.

"I love my MJ Jammer! Good quality, well-designed, easy to use. Very satisfied!" - Miss L, Verified Buyer

"The air flow, portability, and value is unparalleled." - Rhett B, Verified Buyer

"This is all I use on a daily basis and I wouldn’t use anything else. Perfect size for travel as well! Can't go wrong with the Jammer!" - Tay, Verified Buyer

"Solidly built, this thing feels *perfect* in your hand. The size is ideal for a one-man daily driver." - Kevin, Verified Buyer

"I bought this as a gift, and the recipient loves it. He likes that it is sturdy and easy to clean. He especially likes the size which, among other things, makes it very portable. I like it because it is aesthetically pleasing." - Nancy J, Verified Buyer

Jammer Dab Rig Features

Our new Jammer Mini Rig has all the features you need and none of the ones you don't.

It's easy to take your dabs with you thanks to its small design and durable construction. The device is made from high-quality borosilicate glass that can handle plenty of wear and tear, so it'll last for years even with daily use.

It's also affordable which is great for those who like to mix it up with different nail materials and accessories. It doesn't boast all the extras that you'll find on higher-priced dab rigs. And yet, the Jammer produces great, satisfying dabs.

Base Connected Perc

The Jammer rig includes a simple, base-connected perc, and there's no recycling or filtration.

Without the added filtration, your rips are as fat and milky as they can be. You'll get a solid amount of vapors, but you'll also get a full-bodied hit that enhances flavor and won't leave you coughing.

10mm Joint

The Jammer includes a 10mm joint that will fit perfectly with quartz bangers of the same size. It's easy to take your dabs on the go because all you need is one accessory.

10mm bangers are slightly smaller, but ask yourself—do you ever pack the whole dish all the way to the top? That’s usually a waste. There's really no need for glassware built in larger sizes—all it does is cost more money to produce.

Built-in Oil Catch

All MJ Arsenal mini rigs include an oil catch in the downstem to help prevent excess oil from seeping into the rig. This helps you get the most out of your concentrates and reduces how often you'll need to clean it.

The oil catch also prevents unwanted odors from polluting your palate. When you dab, some oils can create a funky taste that will linger on your tongue for hours after use. By catching some of the excess oil in the downstem, you can eliminate this effect since the hottest oil has a place to recondense.

Small Form Factor

The Jammer is the smallest of our mini rigs, measuring in at a solid 4.25 inches tall. So, you can hide it away in a backpack or purse—just make sure to stash it in your MJ Arsenal padded zipper pouch for added protection.

A smaller concentrate rig is more convenient and less bulky if you’re trying to store it for travel. Its reduced size makes it ideal for carrying with you and pulling it out when you’re ready. It's made from high-quality borosilicate glass so you can rest easy knowing that your dab rig is built for longevity and durability.

Benefits of a No-Frills, All-Function Dab Rig

The benefits of a no-frills, all-function dab rig are what make them so awesome. They are easy to clean because they have an oil catch to prevent excess oil from seeping into the rig. With no added filtration, they’re easy to maintain and clean.

Without added filtration, you also don't have to worry about splashback or messes. You can get some head-punching puffs with nothing but a little water standing between you and your dabs.

Another awesome feature is that it comes with an ultra-compact form factor, making it easy to take your dabs with you on the go. It's so compact that it fits right in the palm of your hand or conveniently in a large pocket. Even better, hits off your Jammer have less contact with the air due to its size. Since less air means more flavor, this makes the Jammer one of our most flavorful rigs!

Accessories For Your Jammer Mini Dab Rig

The MJ Arsenal Padded Zipper pouch is a must-have for any Jammer Mini Rig user. It will safeguard your rig's finish and keep it scratch-free while also functioning as a convenient means of transporting anything you need.

Dab tools are available for purchase in our store. They're ideal to use with our unique rigs and come with a heat-resistant grip. You can easily load your rig to enjoy all the benefits of dabs without any of the mess.

We're thrilled to share the launch of our new spinner carb cap which is compatible with your favorite terp pearls (available from MJA in transparent quartz or synthetic ruby). The spinner cap helps circulate air around your terp pearls to enhance heat distribution to keep your dab hitting longer.

A dab mat from our MJA collection is the ideal complement for your Jammer Mini Rig to keep the mess at bay. It's intended to sit beneath your rig and collect all of the spillage and splashes. You may also put down your accessories on top of it while loading dabs.

How to Clean Your Jammer

Thanks to its simplicity and functionality, cleaning a no-frills dab rig is easy—but it does require a little bit of time. All you need to clean your Jammer is some isopropyl alcohol and cotton swabs.

Take the banger out of the stem, then fill up a container with enough alcohol to submerge both pieces. Submerge the two components and allow them to soak for about an hour.

Take your cotton swabs and dip them into the alcohol, then begin scrubbing away at both elements of your rig. Make sure you pay attention to any grooves or holes where oil can potentially get caught—especially the grooves in the base connected percolator. You may need to use pipe cleaners to reach all the way down into the perc.

The next step is to drain and rinse all of the alcohol from the rig with hot water. Continue running water through your Jammer to push free the loosened residue.

If your rig is really dirty and there are still some chunks inside, fill it with warm water and a bit of table salt. Hold your rig securely by its base and the mouthpiece with both hands, then shake it vigorously. The abrasive action from the salt water will help scrape off the oil without being strong enough to harm the glass.

Rinse thoroughly several times to ensure you remove all of the isopropyl alcohol, then set the pieces aside to air dry. And here’s a pro-tip: Make sure to let your rig cool down naturally, reaching room temperature, without using cold water.

Get Your Jammer Mini Dab Rig Today

At MJ Arsenal, our glassware is hand-crafted using premium glass materials and cutting-edge fabrication techniques to ensure your rig travels far and lasts long. With MJ Arsenal's commitment to durable, high-quality products, you can find the perfect addition to your collection.

The Jammer has all you need for a top-shelf dabbing experience: a mini rig, a quartz banger, and an oil catch. We know you're going to love the convenience of this all-inclusive kit, so we invite you to try our lowest-priced dab rig before it sells out.

What Is the Infinity Mini Dab Rig?

Why Everyone Loves Infinity Dab Rigs

"Whether I'm at home or on the go, I use this mini dab rig as a way to relax after a long day. The size is perfect for taking huge hits without feeling any drag."

"If you're looking for a great travel piece that's easy to carry around — look no further. This thing fits right in my pocket (not that I'd ever keep it there)."

Infinity Mini Dab Rig Features

The Infinity is 5.4” tall, which is a medium height compared to the other dab rig water pipes we offer.

The small size makes it easy to carry around with you. But don't let its compact design fool you — this dab rig produces monster hits. It also includes some of the most advanced features you can pack into a rig this small.

Splash Guard

The splash guard is designed to keep the water inside of your pipe and out of your mouth. It's equipped with a small hole that enables airflow, while preventing any excess water from leaking into the main chamber.

The Infinity's splash guard is recessed and includes a smaller second chamber to catch droplets pulled into the air with your inhale. This unique feature prevents any water from leaking into your mouth during use.

Built-in Oil Catch

A built-in oil catch is an essential part of a dab rig. It’s designed to control any excess oil that is pulled into your piece by capturing it in a dish or container before it seeps into the main chambers.

The bottom of the oil catch is slightly concave, enabling excess concentrates to pool until you scrape them out. It’s built into the downstem and is very easy to clean with a dabber tool or a cotton swab.

Bent Neck

The neck of this water pipe is slightly bent at an angle, providing you with greater comfort while you smoke. This also prevents water from entering your mouth, as it could with a straight pipe.

Base-Connected Perc

The base-connected perc is made of a disc-style percolator at the bottom of the piece. The size and location allow for more variation in effective water levels. This way, if you prefer less water cooling, you can use a lower water level and still achieve effective percolation.

The Infinity's base-connected perc creates bubbling action while eliminating harshness and drag. This feature keeps your hit at a comfortable temperature, which is great if you prefer larger hits that are cooled down by the water in the percolator. 

Double Uptake Recycling

After percolating through the disc, your vapor enters an egg-shaped chamber and then flows through a pair of stems that curve up to the top to create a swirl pattern. This enables you to take smooth hits while keeping the vapor cool and free of impurities.

The water inside of the recycler cools down your vapor and then cycles back to the bottom of the piece through the drain pipe.

Benefits of a Double Uptake Fab Egg Rig

The Infinity has been designed with state-of-the-art features. This is why it outperforms other dab rigs in its category.

The double uptake recycler configuration is combined with fab egg-style percolation to increase the potency and the fun of every rip.

After a vaporizer or dab nail heats and vaporizes your concentrate, the filtration can begin.. The extracted vapor disperses and cools through the recycler chamber, with the cooled hit flowing via the upper splash chamber and into your mouth for optimum taste.

The Infinity's base-connected perc creates bubbling action while eliminating harshness. You can count on a desirable hit temperature with every drag.

This design makes the rig look futuristic while also giving it a smooth, comfortable draw. Keep in mind that while the Infinity is sold as a concentrate rig, you can convert it into a traditional waterpipe with MJ Arsenal’s 10mm flower bowl. 

Best Accessories for Your Infinity Mini Rig

The MJ Arsenal Padded Zipper Pouch is a great accessory for your Infinity Mini Rig. It'll keep your rig safe and secure while protecting the finish from scratches and abrasions.

Carb caps are essential for controlling the airflow and efficiency of each hit. These caps are made of ultra-durable borosilicate glass, which means you can quickly clean them with any type of all-purpose cleaner. They also hold up well, even with regular use.

Our dabber tools have been specifically designed for use with our dab rigs and assorted concentrates. These tools are very helpful when it comes to loading your dab rig and removing excess concentrates when necessary.

The clear glass finish makes it suitable for enhancing the appearance of any space. You can vape your favorite concentrates or use our brand new flower bowl to smoke it like a traditional water pipe.

What Is the Mini Jig Dab Rig?

It's Compact and Convenient

The Jig Is a Smooth Operator

Splash Guard

Oil Catch

However, with an MJ Arsenal carb cap, you'll enjoy restricted airflow, which helps prevent leakage from the banger into the downstem. This means your oil catch fills up even more slowly—a sure sign that you're getting a full hit out of each dab.

Base Connected Perc

The Mini Jig's base-connected percolator provides even more cooling to your smoke, bringing out the flavors of any substance you decide to put into it. The percolator's simple half-egg shape distributes bubbles evenly throughout your rig, ensuring that you only experience the best flavors your product has to offer.

This sleek design also makes your rig easier to clean. The percolator sits right at the base of the downstem, meaning it's easy to reach with some isopropyl alcohol or a mild heat source for cleaning purposes.

Single Uptake Recycler

The Mini Jig is also equipped with a single uptake recycler, giving you impressive air pressure to rip the best clouds possible. The Mini Jig delivers elite water filtration for your vapor before it reaches your mouthpiece for an awesomely smooth experience.

This recycler configuration also helps to maximize the amount of vapor you can take in with each rip. By pulling the vapor through your recycler before it reaches the mouthpiece, your hit is cooled off even more, so it's not as harsh when it reaches your throat.

The hot vapor is dispersed in the recycler chamber and cooled. The cooled hit travels through a small splash chamber and into your mouth for maximum taste after passing through a low-key splash chamber.

The base-connected perc of the Mini Jig produces bubbling action while reducing harshness and drag. If you enjoy bigger hits that are cooled down by the water in the percolator, this feature keeps your hit at a pleasant temperature.

Between hits, you can clean up your banger with the MJ Arsenal iso station. With space for your swabs and a chamber for extra dabs, this tool will keep your rig looking and smoking its best between full cleanings.

This convenient station is also great for dabbing sessions with multiple people since your banger will gunk up that much faster.

Speaking of bangers, we've also introduced a brand new line of reinforced half-weld and full-weld quartz buckets. Each pure quartz bucket features an extra-strength joint that provides a secure seal. The joint also covers more of the quartz to slightly improve heat retention.

Splash Guard

Long gone are the days of pulling a little too hard and ending up with an unpleasant mouthful of water. With our splash guard, the water stays contained in the rig. So, the water won’t go anywhere near your mouth.

Oil Catch

Base Connected Puck Perc

It's Sturdy and Balanced

The Gemini Mini is very well balanced and our team has rigorously tested its durability. The flat bottom design guarantees that it stays sturdy and firm while you've got your quartz banger in place, even with a carb cap resting on top.

The entire rig is expertly blown and fused with 100% borosilicate glass, which is known for its extreme heat-resistant durability. Boro glass is our pride and passion, and we've gotten our glassblowing process down to an exact science. That's how we can confidently say that each rig we ship is ready for years of fat rips.

The Gemini Hits Nice and Easy

The Gemini Mini is an easy dab rig for anyone to use, even a beginner. It’s compact, durable, and hits smoothly. The quartz banger is removable so you can easily switch out the bowl within seconds. This beauty features an inverted cone base which helps minimize water volume while maximizing terpenes.

The double ball upper filtering system ensures no vapor is lost, ensuring you get flavorful hits and enjoy every little bit out of your dabs. These features come together to provide a clean and flavorful draw every time, that's true-to-taste and easy on your lungs.

MJ Arsenal Gemini: Mini Rig Features

The Gemini Mini is a compact and sophisticated unit designed with all of the essential features you'd want in a dab rig. Its innovative design provides you with both an aesthetically pleasing experience and one that also ensures smooth functionality.

Thanks to our team's dedication to artistic exploration and creativity, no two MJ Arsenal rigs are the same. As a part of our Orbital series, the Gemini Mini is an outstanding dab rig that celebrates our passion for taking design to bold new heights.

Splash Guard

We created an innovative splash guard to ensure your smoking experience goes smoothly without any pesky accidents. The subtlety of the inverted cone shape matches the base while guarding against splashback and preventing unnecessary messes. The neck angles away from the rig to make your hits comfortable and catch every drop.

Oil Catch

This piece is designed with an oil catch to keep your water clean and fresh. The catch is located just beneath the receiver, keeping the oil close to the outlet to make cleaning and reclaiming a breeze.

Adding a carb cap from MJ Arsenal will limit airflow while still allowing you to pull crazy hard. With this sort of dabbing, your oil catch fills up slower—an indication that you're getting the most out of each dab.

Base Connected Puck Perc

The Gemini's built-in percolator ensures that every dab you load into it is properly cooled, bringing out the subtleties in your terpenes and allowing you to celebrate their true, full flavors.

The percolator's simple shape distributes bubbles evenly throughout your rig, ensuring that you only experience the best flavors your product has to offer.

Ergonomic Shaping

With a timeless shape and function, this is one of our most simple yet unique dab rig offerings. Its size and shape fit comfortably in small hands, and it’s easy to grip so you can maintain a firm grasp during intense rips.

The double ball provides both an aesthetic and functional feature that further filtrates the vapor. In addition to its filtration and splash-blocking benefits, the double ball shape adds weight to the center of the piece. This balances the rig and lowers the center of gravity so it won’t tip over when empty.

Double Ball Upper

The double ball is a blend of form and function. Vapor travels through the inner ball, through the puck perc, and then through the outer ball towards the mouthpiece. This mechanism allows the rig to be much more compact and durable at the same time.

The inner ball catches some oil as it seeps into the rig, making it far easier to clean with a pipe cleaner before the puck perc itself becomes dirty.

Benefits of a Double Ball Dab Rig

The double ball mechanism creates a unique experience as the vapor hits both surfaces simultaneously. Vapor first filters through the innermost chamber, absorbing heat before passing through the puck perc on its way to the outermost chamber.

This allows you to have a stronger hit that's more efficient. In addition to the double ball, this rig features an inverted cone design that further increases airflow and acts like a splash guard.

The Gemini is a design and function masterpiece, with all the bells and whistles you expect from MJ Arsenal. Its superior engineering and innovative design set a new standard for the dab rig market.

Get Your Gemini Mini Rig Today

MJ Arsenal's Gemini Mini Rig is a beautiful piece of functional art. Thanks to its innovative features, it will improve both the look and taste of your favorite products. Our dab rigs are made to the highest quality and safety standards, ensuring that you get a perfect hit every time.

Our team of passionate dab enthusiasts explores new forms of artistic expression while providing each customer with an innovative piece that they can enjoy and proudly showcase in their home. Join the MJ Arsenal revolution and grab your Gemini today.

title: MJ Arsenal Reclaim / Dry Ash Catcher
description:
Our Reclaim / Dry Ash Catcher is hand-crafted from 100% borosilicate glass for performance and cleanliness. This dual-function accessory captures resin and ash, ensuring a clog-free rig and reducing the need for regular cleaning.

Our novel device features a removable 18mm to 10mm insert, allowing for various size quartz options and providing TRUE accessibility for users who prefer reloading their buckets with reclaimed oil on the go. With this unique accessory, you can efficiently recycle your dabs and keep your rigs and water pipes pristine like never before.

As an ash catcher, it traps byproducts before they enter your dab rig, adds extra water filtration to cool down the smoke, and safeguards your rig from heat damage.

As a reclaim catcher, it collects leftover oil (reclaim) after dabbing, keeping your rig clean and the reclaim ready for reuse. Its detachable cup allows easy collection and recycling of these sticky substances.

Upgrade your setup with this Reclaim / Dry Ash Catcher for enhanced performance and easy maintenance.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass
Joint: 10mm
Dimensions: 2.5in x 2.25in x 1.5in

What’s in the box:
Reclaim / Dry Ash Catcher
18mm to 10mm insert

Best rigs to use with the MJA Reclaim / Dry Ash Catcher: Titan, Ursa, Apollo and Gemini

TIP: You might experience tipping with some of our mini rigs. We recommend positioning it closer to the rig to help distribute the weight more evenly instead of having the catcher sticking out directly in front of your rig.

title: MJ Arsenal Royale Vape Edition
description:
Introducing the revolutionary Royale Vape Edition. Based on our popular Royale Mini Dab Rig, it’s Inspired by one of the most iconic shapes in glass. The Royale Vape Edition is a modified version of the classic “fab-egg” and converts any vaporizer pen into a compact, highly efficient dab rig.

This bubbler has an integrated two-chamber system, providing both primary and secondary filtration. Hot vapor and cool water are harmoniously combined within these chambers, delivering a smooth, clean pull with each use.

This bubbler's versatile female spout caters to most circular tip vaporizers, seamlessly enhancing your vaporizer pen's functionality.

Beyond its primary filtration, the Royale Vape Edition excels with its secondary filtration. It houses a base-connected percolator and a fab egg-style percolator, both working together to create a bubbly action for extra cooling and smoke dispersion. This superior two-step filtration results in smoother, cooler, and more enjoyable hits.

A built-in splash guard ensures your sessions remain clean and grime-free, while the integrated oil catcher simplifies clean-up and prevents sticky residue buildup. These thoughtful additions highlight our commitment to an elevated, hassle-free vaping experience.

It’s like magic when you insert your vaporizer, pull, and witness the production of massive clouds. Filtering your vapor through water delivers an incredibly smooth hit, eliminating harshness and enhancing flavor. This process creates a smoother, more enjoyable smoking experience, typically found in larger, stationary dab rigs but now accessible in a portable format.

Compact yet power-packed, the Royale Vape Edition perfectly blends style and functionality. Its discreet yet captivating design makes it an ideal companion for on-the-go sessions, while its reliable performance and easy maintenance have won the hearts of many users.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass

Broad, Sturdy Base

title: MJ Arsenal Ursa Mini Dab Rig
description:
Presenting the Ursa Mini Dab Rig™ by MJ Arsenal, a palm-sized powerhouse merging classic aesthetics with modern innovation. This exquisite mini dab rig is hand-crafted from 100% borosilicate glass and offers a remarkable dabbing experience, delivering powerful hits typically associated with larger glass pieces.

The Ursa Mini Dab Rig operates through its reinforced, base-connected discus percolator, breaking the vapor into minuscule bubbles for optimal water diffusion. This is then spun into a vortex in the internal chamber for a second filtration, making each pull fresh, smooth, and flavor-filled.

Unique features like the rear-mounted downstem and built-in reclaim catcher help prevent spills, clogs, and the loss of precious concentrate. It employs a custom flat quartz bucket for efficient use of every drop.

The Ursa also sports an incycler design, generating cyclones of water to cool vapor for the smoothest hits. The rig's design ensures water doesn't spray out the mouthpiece and simplifies cleaning. All these functionalities are packed into a portable rig crafted from the finest borosilicate glass, making it not just a smoking device, but a piece of art.

Material: 100% Borosilicate Glass
Joint: 10mm
Dimensions: 5in x 3in x 2.25in

What’s in the box:
Ursa Mini Dab Rig
Mini Rig Standard Quart Bucket
Flat Carb Cap
Stainless Steel Mini Dab Tool

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.

What is the Ursa Mini Dab Rig?

The Ursa Mini Dab Rig has it all: functionality, stunning design, and easy-to-use features. Made from the highest quality borosilicate glass, the MJ Arsenal Ursa Mini rig combines its classic look with modern features for an out-of-this-world session.

Because of its unique rear-mounted downstem and reinforced base-connected discus percolator, the Ursa Mini rig can outperform rigs even twice its size.

At MJ Arsenal, our palm-size mini dab rigs are functionality-packed to take any ordinary session to the next level And, the Ursa mini rig will do just that.

What Sets the MJ Arsenal Ursa Mini Dab Rig Apart?

At MJ Arsenal, we’re the original provider for mini dab rigs. We prioritize functionality and quality design to give you an experience you won't soon forget — and the Ursa mini dab rig is no exception.

This unmatched dab rig turns tiny bubbles into swirling cyclones of water that cool vapor and deliver the smoothest, most flavorful hits. Whether you're a seasoned smoker or a first-timer, the Ursa mini dab rig will satisfy your sessions." 

Ursa Mini Dab Rig Features

The MJ Arsenal Ursa Mini Dab Rig creates maximum water diffusion and constant flow through innovative mechanics unique to the MJA family.

Incycler Dab Rigs:

The MJ Arsenal Ursa mini dab rig is a one-of-a-kind rig that uses an incycler design to create cyclones of water to cool hot vapors. We took the functionality of the traditional recycler and stepped it up a notch with an internal chamber that houses the Ursa mini rig mechanics.

Built-in Reclaim Catcher

Few things are worse than losing precious concentrate to the abyss at the bottom of your rig. Fortunately, the MJ Arsenal Ursa mini rig has a built-in reclaim catcher to collect nectar for later use.

Between a reclaim catcher and an MJA custom flat quartz bucket, you can take advantage of every last drop of concentrate.

Rear-Mounted Downstem

Long gone are the days of water splashing and spilling with the MJ Arsenal Ursa mini dab rig. Because of its unique rear-mounted downstem and base-connected discus percolator, vapor can travel through water without spraying out the mouthpiece.

In addition to helping prevent spills, the MJ Arsenal Ursa mini rig design is easier to keep clean — preventing clogging with a second rinse.

Plus, this stunning MJ Arsenal design keeps pulls smooth and delivers hits unrivaled by other rigs on the market.

Dimensions

  • 5.25in x 3in x 2.25in

This product and all products on this site are intended and sold for legal purposes only.
Below, we explore why a glass chillum might just be the innovative addition you need to your smoking repertoire. Let’s delve into the history, usage, and varieties of these impressive devices.

How to Use Your Chillum

To get the most out of your chillum, it’s good to know how to properly use one. Glass chillums, also known as one-hitters, have a unique structure that makes them more efficient. Unlike conventional pipes, they are shaped into straight, narrow tubes that end in a front-loaded bowl, simplifying the smoking process.

Smoking with a chillum starts by lightly packing your herb into the bowl. Remember: overpacking the bowl can block airflow and make it difficult to draw smoke. Next, ignite your herb while simultaneously inhaling. Be mindful to control your inhalation speed to prevent the herb from burning too quickly.

An important aspect of chillum usage is its maintenance. Regularly cleaning yours is essential in preventing resin build-up, as that can negatively impact the taste and smoothness of your smoke. A simple soak in isopropyl alcohol, followed by a gentle scrub, will keep your chillum in optimal condition.

Overall, glass chillum pipes offer an innovative, straightforward smoking experience. Knowing how to use and maintain yours will enhance future smoke sessions and extend the lifespan of your chillum.

Chillums at MJ Arsenal


If you're in the market for a chillum, MJ Arsenal offers a wide variety of these distinct compact pipes. Explore our selection and find discover the clean, straightforward, and efficient smoking experience that chillums provide. These simple glass hand pipes, an instrument of worldly detachment, are now an innovative tool in the hands of modern smokers.

MJ Arsenal's glass chillums are an embodiment of craftsmanship and artistry, each piece a testament to the fusion of functionality and aesthetics. Our collection is rich in form and design, from the minimalist to the intricate, catering to your unique taste.

As the user inhales from the chillum, the smoke is directed straight to the mouth, providing a powerful, immediate hit. This direct experience, coupled with their ease of use and portability, makes chillums a favorite among many smokers.

MJ Arsenal is constantly evolving, as we’re always on the lookout for fresh ideas and designs to enhance your smoking experience. Here, innovation meets tradition, providing you with a range of chillums that are as diverse as the individuals who use them.

Dive into the world of MJ Arsenal's chillums, where every puff is a journey into a world of smooth, pleasant smoking experiences.

Factors for Choosing a Chillum

When choosing a chillum or other smoking instrument, you should consider several factors, such as size, design, material, and personal smoking preferences. Glass chillums offer a myriad of options that can cater to these factors, allowing for a customized smoking experience.

  • Size: The size of a chillum impacts its portability and the intensity of the smoke. Smaller chillums are ideal for discreet, on-the-go use, while larger ones can provide a thicker, more potent smoke.
  • Design: Chillums come in various designs and shapes, from simple and minimalist to complex and artistic. Your choice should reflect your style and usage setting.
  • Material: Glass is a popular choice due to its purity, allowing for a clean, untainted smoking experience. However, the thickness of the glass plays a crucial role too. Thicker glass provides more durability but may come with a higher price tag.
  • Personal Preferences: Ultimately, your chillum should align with your smoking habits. If you prefer quick, intense sessions, a small, thick glass chillum might be your best bet.

Additional Chillum Information

Now that you're familiar with the factors to consider when choosing a chillum, let's delve into some extra details about these unique pipes.

Glass chillums, with their sleek design and transparent allure, are a favorite among seasoned users and beginners alike. 

The bowl of a chillum is where the magic begins, as it’s where you pack your smoking material. The size of the bowl can dictate how long your session lasts, with larger bowls being ideal for longer sessions or group use.

Glass chillums are also known for their ease of cleaning. Unlike other materials, glass doesn't absorb residues and odors. With a quick soak in a cleaning solution and a gentle scrub, your chillum will be as good as new.

The portability of a chillum is another advantage. Its compact size makes it ideal for on-the-go smoking. Slip it into your pocket or bag, and enjoy a smoke wherever you fancy.

With this additional chillum information, you can make a more informed choice and enhance your smoking experience.

Cleaning Your Glass Chillum

Next, let's dive into how you can clean your glass chillum to ensure its longevity and optimal performance. Cleaning your glass chillum is a simple procedure that requires a few tools and a bit of time. 

Here's a step-by-step process you can follow:

  1. Empty the Chillum: First, make sure to empty out any herb or residue from your glass chillum. You can use a pipe cleaner to do this effectively.
  2. Soak in Isopropyl Alcohol: Next, soak your chillum in isopropyl alcohol. This helps to loosen any sticky leftover residue that might be clinging to the glass.
  3. Scrub it Clean: After soaking, use a pipe cleaner to scrub the inside of the chillum. Be careful to scrub gently and avoid applying too much pressure, as you don't want to risk breaking your chillum.
  4. Rinse and Dry: Finally, rinse your chillum with warm water several times and then let it dry completely before using it again.

Benefits of Shopping at MJ Arsenal

MJ Arsenal acts as a one-stop shop for all your smoking needs. Their glass pipes are meticulously crafted, offering a smooth, flavorful smoke. Small bowls, ideal for individual use, are available in a huge range of designs, ensuring you'll find a piece that resonates with your personal aesthetic.

Are you a dry herb enthusiast? MJ Arsenal provides chillums designed for direct, potent rips, enhancing the herb's natural flavors. If you prefer water filtration in your smoke routine, the bongs we offer range from simple, sleek designs to intricate, artistic creations.

In essence, shopping at MJ Arsenal not only enriches your smoking experience but we combine innovation, aesthetics, and quality.

MJ Arsenal Chillum Products

If you're a fan of high-quality glass chillums, you'll find MJ Arsenal's range of products particularly appealing. These chillums are designed with discerning smoke enthusiasts in mind, crafted from high-grade borosilicate glass that's renowned for its durability and heat resistance.

Here's a detailed breakdown of other ways that MJ Arsenal's chillums set themselves apart:

  • Innovative Design: Each pipe is meticulously crafted, showcasing the brand's commitment to innovation and aesthetics.
  • Pocket-Friendly: These chillums are small, lightweight, and easy to carry, making them perfect for on-the-go use.
  • Powerful Hits: Despite their size, these chillums deliver a strong punch, ensuring a satisfying smoking experience.
  • Quality Materials: Made from high-grade borosilicate glass, these chillums are designed to withstand high temperatures and last a long time.

Our chillums are some of the best one-hitter pipes on the market. Purchase one and enjoy a smooth, quick smoke wherever you may be. For similar pieces, consider browsing our hand pipe collection as well.

Why Use One Hitter Over Other Pipes

In comparison to other pipes, using one-hitters like chillums can offer you a more streamlined and potent smoking experience. One-hitters are the epitome of smoking simplicity and ingenious design. 

Here's why you might prefer one-hitters:

  1. Simplicity: With one-hitters, there's no complex mechanism or additional parts. You load, light, and inhale. It's as simple as that.
  2. Portability: One-hitters are compact and lightweight. You can slip them into your pocket or purse, making them perfect for on-the-go use.
  3. Dosage Control: With one-hitters, you can easily control your dosage. They're designed for single hits, making it easier to regulate your intake.
  4. Discretion: One-hitters are discreet. They're small, easy to conceal, and produce less smoke, ideal for maintaining a low profile.

Through the aspects of ease of use, portability, dosage control, and discretion, one-hitters are hands down the best personal smoking pieces to use.

As you delve into the world of 420 and 710 smoke experiences, remember that innovation doesn't always mean complexity. Sometimes, the simplest designs, like one-hitters, can offer the most satisfying experiences.

What's the Difference Between a Chillum and a One-Hitter?

While chillums and one-hitters are favored for their simplicity and portability, there are a few key differences between them that you should know.

Essentially, a chillum is a type of one-hitter, but not all one-hitters are chillums.

A chillum is a straight tube pipe with an end-to-end channel. It's typically larger, offering a more generous bowl size, and is designed to be held upright when lit. This design allows for a more direct, robust hit, but it also means you need to strike a balance to prevent your herbs from falling out.

On the other hand, a one-hitter is a smaller, more discreet tube, usually with a slight curve. It's designed for quick, stealthy hits, hence the name. One-hitters often feature a dugout, a small container for your herbs, which makes them ultra-portable and convenient.

Advantages of Chillums

Now that you’re familiar with the differences between a chillum and a one-hitter, here are some notable and unique advantages of chillums that can enhance your smoking experience:

  1. Ready-to-go: Chillums are so well known because of how easy they are to carry. They fit in your pocket, making them perfect for on-the-go use.
  2. Ease of use: There's no need for complex set-up or cleaning processes. Chillums give you a straightforward smoking experience so you and your friends can enjoy a nice puff wherever you are. 
  3. Stronger, smoother pulls: The absence of a carburetor in chillums lets you take strong, direct hits. This design leads to more potent experiences than other pipes offer.
  4. Aesthetic Appeal: Chillums come in a variety of designs and materials, but glass chillums, in particular, offer a clean, modern aesthetic that's both functional and stylish.

These advantages make chillums an attractive option for those in search of a simple, portable, and powerful smoking tool.

Whether you're a seasoned smoker or a novice, you'll appreciate the blend of convenience, potency, and style that a glass chillum can bring to your smoking sessions.

History of Chillums

With a rich history and spiritual significance, it’s interesting to know the origins of glass chillums. Their history is as intriguing as the pipes themselves. 

Tracing back thousands of years in India’s history, Hindu monks, known as Sadhus, were the first known users of these unique pipes. They revered the chillum as a sacred object, using it in their meditations and spiritual practices.

The evolution of chillum pipes over time has been a product of both culture and necessity. Initially, they were made from clay, but artisans started crafting them from glass as time passed. 

This shift elevated the aesthetic appeal of chillums and significantly improved the smoking experience they provided. Also, the transparency of our glass chillums allows you to observe the entire process, creating a connection between you and your smoke.

In the modern world, chillums continue to be a popular choice for smoking enthusiasts. Their compact size, coupled with the potent and direct smoking experience they offer, makes them an appealing choice for both novices and seasoned smokers.

Frequently Asked Questions

What Types of Materials Are Used to Create Chillums Other Than Glass?

Apart from glass, you'll find chillums made from materials like wood, metal, acrylic, and porcelain. Each offers a unique aesthetic and smoking experience, so it's all about finding what suits your individual tastes and preferences.

How Often Should I Clean My Glass Chillum for Optimal Use?

After a few uses, you should clean your glass chillum. This helps keep its optimal performance. Regular cleaning also prevents residue build-up, ensuring smoother, purer hits. Just this one simple step can elevate your smoking experience with a great chillum.

Are There Any Health Risks Associated With Using a Glass Chillum?

While you're enjoying your chillum, issues can pop up if it's not cleaned regularly. Residue buildup can lead to you inhaling harmful substances. So, always ensure your pipe is pristine to enhance your experience and protect your health.

Can a Glass Chillum Be Used for Substances Other Than Tobacco or Herbs?

Certainly, you can use a glass chillum for substances other than tobacco or herbs. However, it's crucial to remember that the legality and effects can vary depending on the substance you choose to use.

Do Glass Chillums Provide a Different Smoking Experience Compared to Other Types of Pipes?

Yes, glass chillums offer a unique smoking experience. They're compact, direct, and powerful. Without a carburetor, you get a full hit, giving a more potent effect than many other pipe types. Chillums are a trendsetter's choice.

Enhance Your Smoking Experience With MJ Arsenal's Chillums

In the smoky landscape of oil and herb pipes, glass chillums stand as a beacon of simplicity and intensity. Choosing one is no mere puff in the wind but a journey into the heart of a time-honored tradition.

With their compact dimensions and potent hits, Chillums are truly the pocket rockets of the herb-smoking world.

So, why not take a leap of faith, pick up a chillum, and let it light up your next smoking experience?
